Name: Trenkwalder Turkey
Description:
Stratejik Dış kaynak İş Ortağıyız.

1985 yılında Almanya’da kurulan, uluslararası alanda 14 ülkede danışmanlık ve tamamı özkaynakları ile olmak üzere doğrudan yatırım faaliyetleri gösteren Droege Grubu iştirakiyiz. Grubumuz, Forbes Global’de ilk 100 ve Forbes Almanya’da ilk 10 şirket arasındadır.

2007 yılında Türkiye pazarına adım atarak İstanbul'daki genel merkezimizden, Türkiye'nin dört bir yanındaki iş ortaklarına çoklu dilde çağrı merkezi, müşteri hizmetleri, müşteri deneyimi ve teknolojileri, telesatış, yazılı kanal hizmetleri, dijital dönüşüm, CRM, seçme ve yerleştirme konularında dış kaynak yönetimi ve danışmanlık hizmetleri sunuyoruz.

Operasyonel süreç ve iş yönetimindeki derin deneyim ve uzmanlığımız, iş ortaklarımızın hedeflerine ulaşmalarında stratejik bir iş ortağı olmamızı sağlıyor. Ekibimizin vizyonu ve grubumuzdan aldığımız güçle, ulusal ve uluslararası alanda çeşitli sertifikalara ve ödüllere layık görülen bir şirketiz.

Name: SellerPlex
Description:
Hi — I’m Nate! A few years ago, I sold my Amazon business but I kept my team.

Why? Because my team was what allowed for my eventual exit. They had me on top of what I needed to be before I even had to ask.

I never had to worry about being on top of our finances and operations, or dealing with all the various random Amazon issues..

Find out more about how our team can help you by going to our website and schedule a free call.

Name: FM2C
Description:
A FM2C destaca-se no cenário empresarial brasileiro como uma força inovadora no setor de Serviços Industriais, Facilities e Volantes. Desde sua fundação em 2014, a empresa tem se dedicado a levar soluções inovadoras e de alta qualidade para seus mais de 90 clientes, tanto nacionais quanto internacionais. Com uma equipe de +5000 colaboradores, a FM2C marca presença em 22 estados e no Distrito Federal, atuando diretamente nas instalações de seus clientes e contribuindo para diversos segmentos da economia.

A empresa é reconhecida por seu compromisso com a excelência operacional e a constante busca pela melhoria de desempenho, sempre através de inovação. A FM2C cuida da infraestrutura de seus clientes com padrões técnicos modernos e seguros, liderados por uma gestão focada em alto desempenho. 


Nos Serviços Industriais, a empresa garante soluções ágeis e seguras, mantendo a disponibilidade dos ativos dos clientes com modelos de gestão global e multiespecialidades.

No segmento de Facilities, a FM2C promove a integração de atividades multidisciplinares para assegurar a funcionalidade das instalações, implementando processos inteligentes e otimizados que transformam o ambiente de trabalho e impactam positivamente as pessoas. 

Já nos Serviços Volantes, a empresa integra equipes e recursos, criando soluções por meio de inteligência colaborativa, planejamento aplicado e engenharia logística, oferecendo serviços operacionais mais eficientes e inteligentes.

A FM2C tem se destacado no mercado com a expansão de seu portfólio, incluindo a FM2C Proteção Anticorrosiva, que oferece soluções avançadas em tratamento anticorrosivo, contribuindo para a durabilidade e a sustentabilidade dos ativos industriais. E a FM2C Soluções Tecnológicas está na vanguarda da inovação, com serviços que integram a Internet das Coisas (IoT) e Inteligência Artificial para otimizar a manutenção e operação dos  clientes, promovendo a eficiência e a tomada de decisões estratégicas baseadas em dados.

NBFC veikla šiandien orientuota į daugiau nei 200 Vyriausybei pavaldžių valstybės įstaigų (tarp jų 11 ministerijų), kuriose dirba daugiau kaip 36 000 žmonių, aptarnavimą teikiant personalo administravimo ir finansinės apskaitos paslaugas. NBFC komandoje dirba apie 500 darbuotojų, kurių darbo vietos pasklidusios visoje Lietuvoje.

NBFC konsoliduojant valstybės įstaigų personalo administravimo ir finansinės apskaitos procesus, siekiama juos standartizuoti ir užtikrinti didesnį jų efektyvumą, kokybę bei greitesnį vykdymą. Laipsniškas personalo administravimo ir finansinės apskaitos funkcijoms atlikti reikalingų duomenų perkėlimas į bendras apskaitos informacines sistemas ne tik kuria vienodą  jų tvarkymo sistemą, bet ir leidžia valstybei smarkiai sutaupyti biudžeto lėšų.

Name: PMVA Inc. Careers
Description:
After more than 20 years of working in the Property Management Industry, CEO Tiffany Bowtell knew there had to be a better way to make growing a rent roll fun and profitable while still managing all the admin deadlines, compliance, legislation and delivery of a great service to Landlords and Tenants. She knew the industry needed new insights and a fresh approach that wasn’t just tech related.

After working as a Property Manager for more than 15 years, Tiffany went on to become the Head Trainer at Console and cloud-based PropertyMe Training Partner. In addition to her Training and Consulting company Property Management Institute of Training, she consulted to more than 6,000 agencies and trained more than 20,000 Property Managers in best practice, software and compliance throughout Australia and New Zealand.

In 2016 her clients began demanding higher levels of quality support that were efficient and cost effective. Hence the creation of Property Management Virtual Assistant. She set up offshore operations in the Philippines with headquarters in Brisbane, Australia and began the long journey into teaching and systemising more than 1,600 back-end processes to fully outsource, run and manage the administration of a property management business. 

With more than 90 employees, 50+ agencies under full time support and 40,000+ Residential properties under admin management, PMVA continues to grow and expand their services. They have seen more than 700% growth in 2017/18 and became finalists in the 2018 Telstra Business Awards making it into the Top 5 businesses in Queensland operating less than 3 years.

With further plans for expansion into the future PMVA is focused on reducing their clients fixed operating costs by $100,000 per year while at the same time increasing their capacity to add a further 200 properties to the rent roll without recruiting or training any additional local staff.

Description:
De Chazal Du Mée, one of the leading business service providers in Mauritius, was founded in 1952 as a firm of Chartered Accountants.

Over the years the firm has expanded to include many other service lines and geographical locations.

Currently the DCDM Organization employs in excess of 700 people and has physical presences in Mauritius, Madagascar, Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda and Zambia as well as representations in Botswana and Reunion Island.

Contribuir para que o cliente dedique maior tempo e foco ao negócio, disponibilizando soluções customizadas e facilidades na área de serviços especializados, com excelência, valorização do nosso capital humano, respeitando as peculiaridades culturais das organizações-cliente.

Ter consolidada a reputação de um grupo líder nos segmentos de terceirização de serviços especializados em todo o Brasil, tendo como marca registrada a ética, a excelência, a valorização de pessoas e a tecnologia.

_ Legalidade: Cumprir e exigir cumprimento da legislação vigente no âmbito Municipal, Estadual e Federal, por parte de seus colabores, parceiros e da sociedade em geral.
_ Ética: cumprir fielmente os acordos, negociações e contratos firmados, agir com transparência e profissionalismo em todos os relacionamentos interpessoais e institucionais.
_ Qualidade: Realizar suas atividades com eficiência e eficácia garantindo a qualidade técnica e celeridade em suas ações.
 _ Valorização do trabalhador: promover oportunidades de crescimento, reconhecimento, qualidade de vida e valorização de idéias.

Name: OV LIFE TRADING COMPANY
Description:
The activities of OV Life as Trading Company include:
Identification of suppliers in different countries with capacity to supply large volumes of generic products at competitive prices.
-Negotiating the terms of sale and delivery of products.
-Financing and assurance of payment to the supplier-exporter.
-Managing logistics and transport.
-Managing customs and barriers of international trade.
-Distribution and sale of the products through its retail network.
At present, we specialize in emerging countries in Asia, Africa or Latin America. Our function is to identify competitive suppliers, negotiate and purchase their products and sell them through a distribution network in its country or neighbouring countries
From a contractual point of view OV Life can act in four different ways

Sales agent for those exporters that are domestic.
OV Life establishes the marketing presence in foreign markets soliciting orders from foreign customers in the name of the manufacturer. Invoicing is done on the name of the manufacturer and helps the exporter with all details of the export transaction. The trading company may suggest the export price, but this principal has the final say on even whether to accept the order.
The relationship with its clients is established through a International Commercial Agency Contract.

Buying agent for importers that want to buy a specific kind of products within a specific territory that can be a country or multiple countries well known by OV Life.
The responsibilities of OV Life may include, among others:
identifying manufacturers and suppliers of products within the described territory;
negotiating prices, terms of delivery and payment; and
managing the international transport of documents which comply with export and import procedures.
The relationship with its clients is established through a International Buying Agent Contract.

Exclusive distributor on a buy-sell basis. OV Life buys a manufacturer at a set price and resells to foreign customers

Description:
A ABECAL é uma entidade beneficente que surgiu oficialmente no ano de 2002, com o objetivo de oferecer a possibilidade de um futuro melhor para pessoas que vivem nas ruas.
Missão
Promover a inclusão social, cultural e econômica de pessoas em situação de risco e vulnerabilidade social, capacitando-os e tornando-os agentes do seu desenvolvimento e de sua cidadania.
Descrição
Em parceria com a prefeitura de São Paulo (SAS - Jabaquara), a ABECAL conta com 2 albergues masculinos com população itinerante de 300 pessoas por dia, com um núcleo de serviçoes que oferece refeição completa, banho, lavagem e secagem de roupas e atendimento social para 160 pessoas durante o dia.
A entidade tem também atendimento feito por assistentes sociais, com acompanhamento individual e cursos profissionalizantes de acordo com o perfil de cada assistido. Cerca de 140 homens recebem abrigo noturno e refeição completa. Os assistidos são homens sem estrutura familiar, na maioria desempregados, catadores de papel, aposentados, inválidos e deficientes que vieram das ruas.

Name: Call Center Hotel
Description:
Türkiye’nin ilk çağrı merkezi oteli Call Center Hotel (CCH), İstanbul ve İzmir lokasyonları ile çağrı merkezi şirketlerine, dönemsel projelere ve çağrı merkezi yatırımı öncesi ihtiyaçlarını belirlemek isteyen kurumlara hizmet veriyor. CCH, Türkiye’ye yatırım için gelen uluslararası çağrı merkezi devlerinin de ilk adresi konumunda.

Bir otel mantığı ile servis veren CCH’de şirketler, en son teknolojilerle donatılmış bir çağrı merkezinin ihtiyaç duyabileceği tüm olanaklardan anında faydalanabiliyor. Kurumların mevcut personeli ile hemen destek almaya başlayabildiği CCH’nin İstanbul Kavacık lokasyonundaki iki binasında 1.400, İzmir lokasyonunda ise 600 koltuk kapasitesi bulunuyor.

Bir çağrı merkezi organizasyonu için gerekli tüm temel altyapı ve teknolojileri bünyesinde barındıran CCH, hemen kullanıma hazır oturma alanları, yemekhane, teras, eğitim salonları, dinlenme ve eğlence alanları ile eksiksiz bir yapı olarak dikkat çekiyor.

CCH’den kısa veya uzun vadede faydalanmak isteyen kurumlar, ellerindeki projeleri, hatta acil durum koordinasyonu gibi ihtiyaçlarını en uygun koşullarda yönetebilme imkânına kavuşabiliyorlar. Bu sayede operasyonel verimliliklerini artırabilen ve ana işlerine odaklanabilen şirketler, elde ettikleri hız ve esneklik gibi yetkinliklerle rekabet avantajı elde ediyorlar.

Name: Africa Talent by Deloitte
Description:

Together, we can make an impact that matters. Leaving a legacy that we can be proud of for Africa’s prosperity.

Africa Talent by Deloitte is joint venture between the Deloitte Africa and Deloitte Netherlands Risk Advisory (Deloitte NL) member firms, with the ambition to support other member firms over time.

Africa Talent currently provides remote support to Deloitte Netherlands (Deloitte NL), allowing professionals to gain international experience, without having to leave their country, allowing global development within the comfort of their home. Africa Talent is a true encapsulation of hybrid work, with professionals required to work from their local Deloitte office for a portion of the work week. Building a distinctive culture is important to us, and regular interactions with the broader team in the office and at social events ensures that we continue to grow our culture.

The engagement of Africa Talent professionals ensures that Deloitte NL is able to deliver on client engagements at commercially feasible rates, while benefitting from working with diverse and highly skilled teams across the African continent. Africa Talent allows Deloitte NL to invest in the African continent to create and develop new talent, generating a sustainable and relevant workforce to service future demand and contribute to Africa’s economies, creating employment across the continent and creating new opportunities to obtain international exposure.

Our monthly revenue reports, which are tailored to the needs of the providers, are simple to comprehend and self-explanatory.

Who we are
At 2nd Office our #1 value is to obsess over the customer. We believe that if we put our customers first everything else that’s good will follow. Our highly educated workforce is supporting over 200 clients globally.

If you do business with us, we will focus on helping you grow your business. We count among our clients some of America’s, the UK and Australia’s Top 500 online retailers and Top 100 Amazon. We help our clients grow one day at a time and as they grow so does our company. Thanks to our clients and our workforce of smart and talented individuals, 2nd Office continues to grow and aims to help innovate the way work is done through technology and educational training. 

We believe if we focus on our customers and employees, everything else will fall into place.

The 2nd Office Difference
Our approach to outsourced/offshore staff goes beyond the talents of the individual. We believe in keeping employees happy and engaged, because a happy employee means they will consistently deliver high-quality work and have a lower turnover rate.

Our attitude towards company culture, management, development, and recruitment is what allows us to keep our staff retention rate higher than our competitors.  Higher retention means that rather than dealing with someone different every time, our employees have the opportunity to learn your business and become increasingly more effective in providing high-quality service.

Name: G9 Outsourcing Corp.
Description:
G9 Outsourcing DBA Rentatelemarketer,net (Rentatel) is a business process
outsourcing company that has been in the business since 2004. Initially a call center
offering inbound and outbound customer support for New York Teleconference, Inc.
(NYTelecon), a facilities-based, FCC 214 licensed long distance service provider in New
York City, USA. In 2007, we expanded our business to include content editing, graphic
editing and data entry in the services we offer. In 2015 following the clamor of our
clients, we started offering medical coding. All our coders are AAPC certified and ICD-10
proficient. Our mission is to enable our customers to outperform competitors with our
commitment to service excellence. In the process, we create value and opportunities for
our customers, employees, shareholders and communities.

Through the years, Rentatel has developed standards and metrics in monitoring the
output of all our employees. Our software engineers programmed a customized
customer relationship management (CRM) software that allows us to monitor their daily
output per day, month and year allowing us to properly compensate and motivate our
agents. We are able to customize the CRM software based on each client’s needs.

We have specialized in the events marketing campaign wherein we call visitors of
certain exhibitors in the shows in Hong Kong, China and Dubai reminding them to visit
these exhibitors located in certain booth numbers. We also do inbound customer support
for a telephone company in the U.S. and telemarketing for home improvement, mortgage
companies, and credit card companies in the U.S. From a modest size and mix, our
client base has grown considerably through the years, attaining its present level in a
relatively short time.

Our membership in the Business Process Outsourcing Association of the Philippines
(BPAP) has allowed us to benchmark and make our performance at par with the other
players in the industry.

Easy Offshore is a consultancy firm that will step your business through the process of setting up your offshore team to ensure that you succeed.  Importantly,  we do not supply offshore staff to you directly.  This allows us to select the right providers, facilities and systems that will work best for your business. 

History:

Easy Offshore was started by entrepreneur Scott Linden Jones, after watching many businesses flounder when setting up offshore teams. He put together a briefing pack to give to friends in business to help them get it right, and found that it made a significant difference to them avoiding key mistakes. This information expanded over time, and eventually it was established into a formal consultancy.

Easy Offshore believes that strong businesses are vital for Australia's economic health.  A strong business is one which leverages the best strategies and models to counter threats and benefit from opportunities.  Two key areas, technology and micro-globalism are pushing the biggest changes to business model since industrialisation. Easy Offshore and its partner technology firms assist Australian businesses to make the transition to a modern and successful business model.

There is no point running a business that employs a lot of Australians, if the business model dooms it to failure in the near future.  A business that employs less Australians but is strong and sustainable is better for Australia than a business which failed to adapt and is shut down.

Name: BASTP (Bourse Algérienne de Sous-Traitance et du Partenariat), Association professionnelle des PMEs
Description:
Association professionnelle d'utilité publique , créée en 1992 avec l’appui du Ministère de l’Industrie et la coopération du Programme des Nations Unies pour le Développement (PNUD) et de l’Organisation des Nations Unies pour le Développement Industriel (ONUDI). 
Sa mission, est la promotion du savoir-faire des PMEs algériennes et le développement la sous-traitance industrielle entre les entreprises donneurs et receveurs d'ordres pour une meilleure intégration locale des produits et composants importés. Aider à l’amélioration des capacités managériales et de mise à niveau des entreprises .La BASTP constitue un moyen du développement de la sous-traitance et du partenariat et à la création des PME/PMI, créatrices de richesses et d’emplois durables.
Elle développe des activités techniques au service des PME, telles que :

• Visite et Recensement des PMI / PME, 
• Gestion de la base de données sur les PMEs, 
• Mise en relation d’affaires (offres et demandes), 
• Organisation de journées techniques, séminaires, forums,
• Organisation de rencontres entre hommes d’affaires, 
• Organisation de missions techniques à l’étranger,  
• Organisation et participation aux salons dédiés à l'industrie et à la sous-traitance industielle au niveau national et international.
• Conseils et assistance aux entreprises adhérentes.


SECTEURS INDUSTRIELS COUVERTS :

• Industrie métallique et métallurgique.
• Industrie Mécanique.
• Électricité, Énergie, électronique, informatique.
• BTPH
• Plastique, caoutchouc et composite
• Industrie chimique.
• Services liés à l'industrie (maintenance, ingénierie, conseil, NTIC)

En Accionssoma S.A.S., nos diferenciamos por nuestra capacidad para adaptar soluciones a las necesidades de empresas de diversos sectores, incluyendo tecnología, manufactura, construcción y servicios financieros. Incorporamos herramientas tecnológicas avanzadas para automatizar y optimizar la gestión de SG-SST, brindando a nuestros clientes tranquilidad, cumplimiento y sostenibilidad.

Nuestra misión es ser aliados estratégicos de nuestros clientes, promoviendo una cultura de seguridad que impulse el bienestar de los trabajadores y el crecimiento empresarial. Juntos, construimos entornos laborales más seguros, saludables y sostenibles.

Name: Intelligent Image Management, Inc. (IIMI) USA
Description:
IIMI offers a wide range of services designed to help customers bridge the digital divide, enabling enterprises to harness the full power of technology. At IIMI, we help our clients to capture and manage data from any format, so they can transform that data into information, information into knowledge, knowledge into insight and insight into action.

It can be as simple as data entry of forms like keying warranty cards, rebate forms, or any other hand written application form, or capturing the same data from a caller. It often involves complex rules based processes where IIMI personnel read and understand the content, make rules based decisions, validate the data with other sources that may be offline or online, and perform audit and analysis of the data for items such as expense report validation, insurance eligibility verification enrollment and claims processing; invoice payments, reporting and database creation, or research and statistical analysis.  Whether working completely behind the scenes, or playing a more active role, IIMI has the depth and breadth of capability to support our customers across multiple geographies and languages.

Usually any work process that is people dependent, transaction intensive, very much routine and repetitive, and which can be processed remotely or off-site can be easily outsourced to IIMI at a fraction of the cost of doing it yourself. Today, utilizing VOIP and/or Internet connectivity, and the simple, secure portability of scanned images make remote processing of many tasks practical and affordable. Bridging the digital divide lowers operating cost, increases customer satisfaction, and enhances technology enablement.
 
Certifications:

ISO 27001 Certified
HIPAA  Compliant
COPC-2000 CSP 
National Minority Council Supplier Development Council / SMBE

Name: Work From Home Association
Description:
The Work From Home Association was born several years ago as a Non Profit organization with the following objectives:

1. Bring jobs back to America while improving the quality of customer service.
2. Make the work at home based job search process easier, faster and without risk.
3. Employ a green initiative by eliminating carbon emissions traveling to and from work.

Our Association matches individuals with companies looking to provide virtual call center services through work from home agents. We research every company to find legitimate work from home jobs, and only accepts jobs that offer a guaranteed pay rate. We then provide a single enrollment process, training when necessary, and match our agent members to companies looking for individuals with their qualifications. We submit the agent's information to each company who will then contact the agents directly. This saves the average job seeker 15 to 20 hours a week normally spent looking for a work from home job and completing multiple applications.
Working at home provides access to more job opportunities, at a guaranteed pay rate, without worrying about geographic and schedule limitations. It reduces normal work expenses such as commuting costs, auto insurance, parking fees, and converts commute time into additional work time or family time.  Work at Home Agents also save on eating in restaurants, and convert many home expenses into tax deductible business expenses.

Name: Yource Group
Description:
De waarde van jouw klanten verhogen, dat is onze missie! Daarom willen we eerst goed begrijpen wat jij waardevol vindt. Is dat de Customer Experience met als doel je klanten te binden? Wil je graag dat je klanten gaan communiceren via digitale kanalen? Of wil je een nieuwe doelgroep aanspreken, waardoor je meer klanten kan bedienen?  
 
Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in alles wat met klanten en contact te maken heeft. Als Business Process Outsourcer (BPO) nemen we die delen van jouw waardeketen over waar klantcontact plaatsvindt.  
 
Met onze expertise, jarenlange ervaring en slimme Tech oplossingen vormen wij de basis. Onze visie is dat je als bedrijf pas het verschil kan maken tijdens het menselijke klantcontact. En dat kan alleen als je je medewerkers (die noemen wij onze Members) ook écht centraal zet in je organisatie. Zonder goede Member Experience geen goede Customer Experience.  
 
Combineer empowerment, zingeving en betrouwbare processen met data en kennis en je krijgt persoonlijk en ondernemend klantcontact. Daarmee maken we het verschil. Dat is waar Yource voor staat.   

Met maar liefst 12.000 Yource Members leveren wij elke dag weer een optimale klantbeleving. Onze kernwaarden Reliable, Digital, Personal en Entrepreneurial staan hierbij centraal. Met onze expertise op het gebied van Recruitment kunnen wij voor elk bedrijf de perfecte medewerkers selecteren: onze Members!We leiden hen op in onze Yource Digital Campus.  
 
Yource heeft een unieke combinatie van klantcontactdiensten: Outsourcing, Insourcing en het uitzenden van personeel. Dit doen we vanuit de Benelux én onze near- & offshore locaties binnen en buiten Europa. We weten welke oplossingen passen bij de missie en visie van onze Partners en leveren maatwerk.Wil jij ook onderdeel zijn van onze Journey?   
 
We zijn graag jouw Partner in klantcontact!  
 
The Source is Yource!

Name: Alta Resources
Description:
Alta Resources has always worked to be something different. Something better. As a BPO, our focus has always been the entire customer experience, not just answering the phones. We’re a privately-held company specializing in building relationships, both with our employees, our clients and our client’s customers. We represent some of the world’s most recognizable brands across various industries, including CPG, healthcare & insurance, automotive, platform economies and retail. Our clients trust us to connect and reconnect with their customers across every touch point, online and offline.

Everything we do is integrated to create a total, seamless brand experience. From the moment a customer visits a website to securely submitting a payment to receiving a package to contacting customer service, Alta Resources fuels every essential interaction on the front lines and behind the scenes. We’re a balanced mix of best people, proven processes and innovative technology.

With our service lines — care, sales, e-commerce, back-office services and fulfillment — working in tandem, clients can grow sales, save costs and consolidate their core business processes through a single, trusted partner. In turn, not only do we create consistent customer experiences on behalf of our clients, but we also make those experiences better so that customers are happy.

While our success has been documented, you may never know our name behind the brands you use daily; we’re OK with that. The secret to helping those brands reach and resonate with consumers is our transparency, meaning teams dedicate themselves to specific clients — and only those clients.

With headquarters and a fulfillment facility in Neenah, Wisconsin, Alta Resources has additional operations in Brea, California, Fort Myers, Florida, Pasig City (Metro Manila) Philippines, Belize City, Belize and Mexico City, Mexico.

To learn more, visit AltaResources.com.

Name: Brickwork India
Description:
Brickwork India, a Women-owned Business Enterprise (WBE) and an ISO 27001: 2022 certified company, is the pioneer and leader in the Business Support Services. Brickwork delivers services which can have a disruptive impact on any organization’s efforts to improve business focus, manage change & enable agility. 

Today’s organizations are at an inflection point of rationalizing ways, costs and processes which can improve a CXO’s efficiency and productivity so that they can deliver value and build a future ready enterprise. This is due to the existing business complexity which has necessitated the need to identify the core and non-core tasks of the CXO genre. The non-core tasks is a key area where organizations can optimize on executive effort sprawl and direct these energies towards core areas like strategic thought, building business resilience and capability building. 

Our Business Support Executives (BSE's) can be leveraged by any industry segment to ensure over 30-40% savings in indirect costs. It can be drilled and driven across industries or business functions, being a powerful change agent, it can be used to drive administrative task management measures and revolutionize ways value is perceived and delivered to stakeholders. It is a game changer with the potential to be viewed as a key component in an organization’s growth engine and can be considered as an operational entity with its own performance indicators to foster indirect growth.

Brickwork has been offering end to end services to over 15,000+ clients across 170+ countries worldwide. The mission is to ensure our BSEs be the major success drivers for top executives by doing their routine non-core work and free up their productive bandwidth for more business focused tasks. We are innovating ways of evolving the marketplace with new offerings and radically influence the way organizations perceive the idea of remote executive assistance.

Talented workforce: Trinidad boasts a highly-skilled labor force and English is the native language. The Dominican Republic boasts a highly-skilled, multilingual labor force.

Infrastructure: Trinidad has the strongest infrastructure out of all the nearshore BPO destinations.

Technology: We have developed technology internally that we offer to our clients, including automation of workflows and bots to lower the required workforce.

Our BPO call center has been able to build a candidate pool of over 25k overqualified agents to scale for long-term as well as seasonal campaigns. At the same time it offers many opportunities for interesting jobs and a unique personal experience. Our job functions at Thule Air Base are many and varied. Therefore, we employ personnel with equally varied educations, skills, and job experiences as relevant to the individual positions.

Our employees must be proficient in Danish as well as in English at the level required by the individual job. Furthermore, a valid driver’s license is required.

Thule Air Base is a military installation and as such all employees must be security cleared through the Danish authorities, and according to agreement with the US Air Force, Greenland Contractors’ employees must be Danish citizens.

Jobs at Thule Air Base:

All our vacant positions are advertised on our website www.gc.gl. Keep yourself updated here and send us your application via our internet application form. 


For further information about Greenland Contractors or Thule Air Base, please refer to our website or call us at our office in Copenhagen.

ACTIV’ADIS est une Entreprise Adaptée qui permet à des personnes handicapées d’exercer une activité professionnelle salariée dans des conditions adaptées à leurs capacités.
Conventionnée par l’Etat, sa mission est économique et sociale. ACTIV’ADIS a donc l’agrément Entreprise Solidaire d’Utilité Sociale.
ACTIV’ADIS a pour vocation d’insérer, d’accompagner, de former et de responsabiliser des hommes et des femmes fragilisés par la vie.
Plus de 80% des salariés sont en situation de handicap et ne peuvent pas, momentanément ou durablement, trouver un emploi en entreprise ordinaire.
Les travaux confiés par une entreprise classique à une entreprise adaptée viennent en déduction de l’obligation d’emploi de personnes handicapées que toute entreprise de plus de 20 salariés se doit de respecter (loi du 11/02/05 N°2005-102).

Un document précisant cette équivalence d’emploi est fourni chaque année à nos clients.

Name: Skansi Offshore
Description:
Skansi Offshore is a shipping company located in Tórshavn in the Faroe Islands. We were pioneers within the offshore segment on our native market, a market characterized by lifelong maritime traditions.

We own and operate 5 state of the art platform supply vessels.
     
At Skansi, we want to be a 100% perfect match for the client, and we put in the extra work to make it happen.

Our ‘always-on’ mindset and dedicated team works to ensure flawless communication, on land and at sea. We continuously strive to be the preferred shipping company. 

Our name clearly delineates our point of departure: the Faroese word 'skansi' means fortress; it is a stronghold, a safe haven, and an observation point from which you 'scan the sea', traditionally from a lighthouse, offering navigational help to vessels and a safe haven to turn to. But there is also a distinctly naval denotation: The 'skansi' of a ship is its aft deck or quarterdeck, traditionally featuring the navigational highpoint and steering.

'Skansi' amply reflects both our local vantage point and our broader, more international outlook. But there is one thing that truly sets us apart from the competition: our team. With operational excellence at our core, we operate with strong respect for the local countries and waters that we work in, adding a human dimension to our approach. While delivering reliable and safe offshore support and transportation services for the international offshore oil and gas industry, our mindset of being 'in good company' extends to our personal relations at our office, on our ships, and with our clients and operational partners.

The only surviving skansi, or fortress, in the Faroe Islands is situated in Tórshavn, the center of the islands. Our headquarters, fittingly located at Skansavegur 7, overlooks the unique features of this 'skansi'. To us, this marks both a continuation of our company's long history and our progressive, forward-looking mindset.

 2.) They don't want to outsource but they need help to streamline their processes and systems.

Fazemos toda a gestão dos seus Recursos Humanos e terceirizamos a mão de obra que você precisar, fazendo a gestão integral da sua folha, otimizando seu tempo e economizando seu capital. Alugamos nossa frota, e, se quiser, te levamos com o nosso motorista, pra você desfrutar uma viagem serena. 
E se você quiser crescer o tamanho da sua empresa, construímos e reformamos seu novo lugar.

Tudo isso enquanto você faz o seu melhor: cuida do seu negócio. Nós cuidamos de você, onde sua empresa estiver, quando você precisar.

Name: Komponentenportal
Description:
Die Idee des Komponentenportals basiert auf dem Komponentenmodell von Professor Faltin. Es unterstützt Unternehmen aller Entwicklungsstufen dabei, Geschäftsprozesse effizient zu organisieren. Gründen und Arbeiten mit Komponenten bedeutet, die Unternehmensprozesse so klar zu strukturieren und aufeinander abzustimmen, dass sie wie von selbst nahezu perfekt ineinandergreifen. Alles Überflüssige wird identifiziert und vermieden. Unternehmer bekommen die Hände für das frei, was wirklich zählt: Sie arbeiten endlich am Unternehmen und nicht mehr länger im Unternehmen. 

Schlanke Prozesse, minimierte Kosten, glückliche Kunden.

Die Prozesse werden schlank, benötigen weniger Manpower und senken damit die fixen und die laufenden Kosten. Dieser Kostenvorteil birgt enormes wirtschaftliches Potenzial: Sie können ihn an ihre Kunden weitergeben, ihre Lieferanten fair bezahlen und ein sehr gutes, umwelt- und sozialverträgliches Produkt allerbester Qualität zu einem konkurrenzlos günstigen Preis anbieten. Damit könnten Sie sogar einen ganzen Markt revolutionieren.

Was steckt hinter dem Komponentenportal?

Das Komponentenportal wird von der Projektwerkstatt betrieben. Viele unserer Komponenten werden aber von externen Dienstleistern durchgeführt, denn auch wir haben das Prinzip der Unternehmensführung mit Komponenten verinnerlicht. Unsere Dienstleister arbeiten langfristig mit uns zusammen und werden natürlich im Vorfeld genaustens unter die Lupe genommen.

Professor Faltins Konzept von Gründen mit Komponenten ist neu für Sie? Dann empfehlen wir: Lesen Sie vor der Registrierung seinen Bestseller Kopf schlägt Kapital. Einen ersten Überblick bieten auch die Videos auf komponentenportal.de/gruenden.

Fókuszunk a magas minőségű, hatékony munkavégzésen van – célunk, hogy ügyfeleink számára valódi üzleti értéket teremtsünk. 
Üzleti portfóliónk széleskörű és szeméyre szabott. Megbízóinkkal számos iparágban működünk együtt.
Partnereink között tudhatjuk többek között a Magyar Telekomot, a Mediánt, az IPSOS-t valamint számos jelentős hazai vállalatot KKV és Nagyvállalati szegmensben egyaránt. 
Kiemelkedően piacképes működési modelleket dolgoztunk ki a telekommunikáció, munkaerőpiaci szolgáltatások, energiaszolgáltatás, kereskedelem, pénzügyi szolgáltatások, IT megoldások, marketing, piackutatás, pályázatírás, rendezvényszervezés és sok más területen. 
Call centerünk két irodában működik Pécs belvárosában, azonban ez nem jelent akadályt abban, hogy az ország bármely pontján tevékenykedő cégeket is a lehető legmagasabb színvonalon szolgáljuk ki. Kizárólag irodai környezetben dolgozunk, teljes munkaidős, jól képzett operátorokkal, akik folyamatos vezetői felügyelet és mentori támogatás mellett végzik munkájukat. ISO és egyéb tanusítványokkal, valmint az összes elvárható call center KPI betartásával. 
Célunk a folyamatos növekedés és innováció, valamint új megbízók bevonása és hosszú távú üzleti kapcsolatok kiépítése meghatározó piaci szereplőkkel. Ezt biztosítja a skálázhatóság, a fejlett technológiai háttér és a multichannel kommunikáció is. 
Szakértelmünk és elkötelezettségünk garanciát jelent arra, hogy minden együttműködés kölcsönösen előnyös és fenntartható legyen.

Name: Ralen Group
Description:
W biznesie można kupić wszystko… oprócz lojalności, zaangażowania i zaufania.

Za każdą silną firmą stoją ludzie, których nie widać w nagłówkach, ale to oni budują każdy jej sukces. 
Od ponad dekady pomagamy przedsiębiorcom odnaleźć właśnie takich partnerów w pracy.

Ralen Group – od 2004 roku łączymy ludzi i firmy, które razem mogą więcej

Każdy przedsiębiorca wie, że prawdziwa siła firmy tkwi w ludziach. To oni wyznaczają rytm codziennej pracy, rozwiązują problemy, dodają energii w trudnych momentach. Bez nich nawet najlepszy projekt pozostaje tylko planem na papierze.

Od ponad dwóch dekad pomagamy przedsiębiorcom w Polsce znaleźć tych właściwych — ludzi, którzy nie tylko wykonają swoją pracę, ale wniosą do zespołu spokój, zaangażowanie i gotowość do działania. Wiemy, że sukces rodzi się wtedy, gdy odpowiednie osoby spotkają się we właściwym czasie.

Dla nas rekrutacja to coś więcej niż proces. To spotkanie dwóch historii — kandydata, który szuka nowego początku, i firmy, która potrzebuje rąk, głów i serc gotowych wspólnie budować przyszłość. Każde takie spotkanie traktujemy jak początek nowego rozdziału.

Dlatego jesteśmy obecni na każdym etapie: od pierwszej rozmowy, przez organizację przyjazdu, aż po zapewnienie bezpieczeństwa i zgodności z prawem. Pracujemy dyskretnie, ale zawsze tak, by efekty mówiły same za siebie.

Zaufali nam liderzy w branżach takich jak produkcja przemysłowa, automotive, logistyka, budownictwo, handel czy FMCG. Wspólnie tworzymy zespoły, które nie tylko działają, ale inspirują do rozwoju i dają firmom pewność, że są gotowe na każdą zmianę.

W biznesie można inwestować w technologie, budynki i strategie. Ale to ludzie pozostają najważniejszym kapitałem.
A my w Ralen Group dbamy o to, by był on zawsze w najlepszych rękach.

Planta situada às margens da rodovia BR-101 em Joinville, maior cidade e polo industrial do estado de Santa Catarina. 5 portos a menos de 100 km de distância.
Ampla área de expedição e recebimento, pátio de manobras e estacionamento de caminhões com 2 mil m². A Termetal armazena produtos acabados dos clientes e realiza embarque programado. Atendimento operacional de expedição e recebimento 24 horas, 7 dias por semana.
Certificada ISO 9001:2015 desde 2018.

Ao terceirizar o acabamento surgem benefícios como:
*Diminui gasto contínuo com infra estrutura da fundição.
*Diminui gasto com movimentação (empilhadeiras/paleteiras).
*Terceirizado não tira férias nem falta.
*Não paga 13º, INSS, FGTS, VA, VT, horas extras, adicional noturno e exames.
*Caso baixa produção pessoal não para, paga por produção realizada.
*Contratações, cálculos de salários, benefícios e cartão ponto diminuem.
*Foca energias na fundição e clientes.
*Desmobiliza parte da gestão, melhora agilidade e administração do tempo da empresa.
*Compras, RH, Manutenção e Qualidade trabalham mais focados.
*Não mais descarta resíduos de acabamento.
*Segurança do trabalho lida menos com acabamento e suas condições de trabalho.
*Possibilita expansão da fundição.
*Libera espaço usado para estoque de acabamento.
*Empresa especialista em acabamento tem profissionais experientes e qualificados.

Para isso, trabalhamos a ideologia da terceirização de serviços com todas as pessoas que de alguma forma, executam serviços que não correspondem com a sua atividade principal, seja ela serviço ou produto, seja ela uma empresa grande ou pequena, seja ela complexa ou simplificada, seja qual for o problema, estamos preparados para apresentar-lhes a melhor solução.

Com a atual globalização e competitividade do mercado, as empresas precisam cada vez mais melhorar os seus produtos ou serviços aos olhos dos seus clientes.

A terceirização dos serviços e/ou da mão-de-obra das atividades não afins da empresa é hoje uma alternativa muito utilizada pelos empresários ou administradores modernos.

O objetivo da terceirização de um serviço é desonerar a empresa da obrigação de viabilizar, desempenhar, acompanhar e administrar serviços necessários a qualquer empreendimento, mas que não dizem respeito à sua atividade principal.

Isto possibilita maior disponibilidade de tempo e tranquilidade para que o administrador possa desenvolver seus próprios projetos, automaticamente aumentando sua produtividade.

Name: Performance Dynamics
Description:
Performance Dynamics LLC was incorporated in February 2001 with the purpose of becoming the premier provider of strategic workforce management insourcing solutions for task repetitive functions within our customer’s organizations.

What is Insourcing?
Insourcing is the opposite of outsourcing; that is insourcing (or contracting in) is often defined as the delegation of operations or jobs from production within a business to an entity that specializes in that operation. Insourcing is a business decision that is often made to maintain control of critical production or competencies.

Where do our services apply? 
If a company already has the space and equipment, but wants help in managing the people, process, and performance of a specific function, position, or area, that is where Performance Dynamics Synergy Solutions apply. Our solutions can be utilized for an ongoing operation or a peak/project situation.

Who considers insourcing through Performance Dynamics? Our typical customer fits one of two profiles:

*Companies considering outsourcing to obtain cost and performance efficiencies, but already own the space and equipment and would like to maintain hands on control of the day-to-day operations.
*Companies that utilize temporary staffing to obtain flexibility in the workforce, but would like to also achieve high production, quality, and overall performance efficiencies within the flexible workforce.

•Retail and Wholesale Lockbox Processing
•Check Processing
•Payment/Remittance Processing
•Statement Production and Distribution Services

We partner to provide reliable and quality online proctoring services through constant innovation, customizable solutions, and seasoned individuals to: 
•	Software Proctoring vendors
•	Assessment Providers
•	Online Education Providers
•	Certifying Agencies

We offer reliable and quality online proctoring services to the Global Market with specialization in Academic, Licensure and Certification. 

Remote proctoring services are a key component of online and remote learning. These services provide the means for verifying the identity of students at a distance before an assessment and the methods for ensuring that students taking the assessment are not cheating or getting unauthorized support. 

1.	Live Proctoring – is quite like your actual classroom invigilation. Except here, a proctor monitors multiple test-takers remotely, using a real time audio and video. The proctor reports any suspicious activity and may even challenge the student or stop the exam.

2.	Recorded Proctoring – test taker’s screen and audio-video feed is recorded throughout the test. A proctor then reviews the recording to determine any committed form of fraud or cheating. 

We understand that proctoring is critical. That’s why our proctors provide with the highest proctoring quality possible.  

Furthermore, we cater to all types of exams such as: 
	Entrance Exams
	Government Employment Exams
	Semester Exams/Term End Exams
	In-class internal assessments
	Skill-based assessments
	Certification exams 

Our team is composed of seasoned individuals with extensive experience in the Online Proctoring service industry. 

Our staff is trained to provide high-quality, professional service that exceeds your expectations. We have a professional approach to our work and strive to meet or exceed all client needs.

A mão-de-obra orgânica, ou seja, cujos funcionários são registrados conforme a legislação trabalhista pelo tomador dos serviços, tornou-se uma aplicação desvantajosa para o empregador, dado o crescimento da demanda, do mercado de trabalho, dos encargos sociais e trabalhistas, contendas na Justiça do Trabalho, turnover (rotatividade), além das atividades de administração de Pessoal.

Fornecer mão-de-obra, pura e simplesmente, é o que todas as empresas de terceirização fazem. No entanto, os gestores da DUO SERV focam a empatia, a iniciativa e a capacidade de boa convivência que cada terceirizado deve ter naturalmente com as pessoas.

•	Reconocimiento de Proveedor Confiable por parte de Schneider Electric México, S.A. de C.V.
•	Premio a la Excelencia que otorga Asociación de Normalización y Certificación, A.C. (ANCE),
•	Reconocimiento del 1er. Lugar en la categoría de “Empresas de Origen Politécnico” en el 9° Encuentro de Emprendedores y Empresarios organizado por Unidad Politécnica para el Desarrollo y la Competitividad Empresarial del Instituto Politécnico Nacional.
•	Reconocimiento por parte de la Comisión de Operación y Fomento de Actividades Académicas (COFFA) del Instituto Politécnico Nacional (IPN) por nuestra labor altruista a favor del Instituto Politécnico Nacional.

En apoyo a la educación, SERVELECmx ha realizado diversas acciones para asegurar el desarrollo profesional de los ingenieros, por tal razón tiene firmados convenios de colaboración con instituciones educativas 
•	Mayo del 2008, Firma de Convenio de Colaboración en materia de Servicio Social con el Instituto Politécnico Nacional para alumnos de la Escuela Superior de Ingeniería Mecánica y Eléctrica (ESIME).
•	Junio del 2010, Firma de Convenio de Colaboración en materia de Estadías Profesionales con la Universidad Tecnológica del Sur del Estado de México, ubicada en Tejupilco, Estado de México.

En Julio del 2011, se Firmo Convenio de Colaboración con Weidmann Tecnología Eléctrica de México, S.A. de C.V. (WTE-M/WDS LAB) como representante en el Valle de Toluca y Valle de la Ciudad de México, inherente a Análisis de Líquidos Dieléctricos.

En Febrero 2012, se iniciaron las acciones de implementación de buenas prácticas en los servicios relacionados con aceite aislante con el fin de garantizar la no contaminación de Bifenilos Policlorados conforme al proyecto del Plan Nacional de Desarrollo  (PNUD) No. UNDP 00059701 inherente al “Manejo y Destrucción Ambientalmente Adecuados de los bifenilos policlorados (BPC’S) en México”.

Actualmente participamos como Socio Activo en AMERIC, A.C. Asociación Mexicana de Empresas del Ramo de Instalaciones para la Construcción, A.C.

Octubre 2017, evolucionamos como Multi Pruebas Eléctricas, S.A. de C.V. atender mejor a nuestros cliente, dando soporte y asistencia técnica en el área de Pruebas Eléctricas.

Seguimos evolucionando, el 01 de octubre Grupo SERVELEC, integra servicios de Automatización, Control, IoT, Análisis de Corto Circuito, Coordinación de Protecciones y Consultoría para cumplimiento de Codigo de RED.

Name: Grupo Dominium Ancoris
Description:
Todo produto de sucesso é fruto de muito trabalho, e isso se aplica a todas as áreas de negócios. A intuição não é suficiente para criar um produto que as pessoas irão adorar e usar. É preciso fazer muita pesquisa, reflexão, planejamento, diferenciar-se e muito mais.

Enquanto na terceirização o foco está na delegação de serviços mais gerais e distantes do core business da empresa, no outsourcing a lógica é outra. Nesta prática, delega-se atividades e funções mais estratégicas e voltadas para a atuação do negócio, ou seja, aquelas atividades que têm íntima relação com o foco final da empresa.

Assim, podemos citar como exemplo os serviços administrativos, financeiros, contábeis, recursos humanos, TI, compras, entre muitos outros. Todos esses serviços podem ser prestados dentro das instalações da empresa contratante ou de forma remota, na sede da contratada.

Em geral, o outsourcing permite que os recursos da organização, tecnológicos, humanos e estruturais, sejam voltados exclusivamente para o core da empresa, aumentando, assim, a produtividade, eficiência e a competitividade — características indispensáveis em um mercado tão intransigente.

LogiScale is truly a different kind of BPO. Our family-owned, USA-based parent company was founded in 1930 by Benjamin Cohen, and has grown steadily, now with over 1,500 USA-based employees and still wholly owned by the Cohen family. In 2009, we built LogiScale to provide BPO services to our parent. And now, we’re providing BPO services to outside clients.

Our Specialty | Small and medium sized teams
Many BPOs neglect their clients with fewer than 20 associates. At LogiScale, we’re the opposite: we specialize in customers that need to deploy small and medium sized teams. In focusing on smaller engagements, we’re able to provide the individual attention necessary to achieve high-quality results.

Our People | We attract and retain the best
Our Human Resources department hand-picks the brightest college graduates in the Philippines. Our pay is well above average, and we offer a complete set of benefits, including full healthcare. As a result, we’ve got the best team in the Philippines, and our associate retention is second to none.

Our Technology | We do not mess around
We have two Internet providers, providing a full 60 megabits of throughput. We have an awesome team of network engineers on staff. Every critical piece of technology in our server room is duplicated for fault tolerance. All power is backed up 24/7 by two diesel generators. Our infrastructure comprises Cisco UCS Servers, Ruckus Meshed Wireless and Shoretel/Ring Central phone systems. In addition we are PCI Compliant!

Our Offices | Location is everything!
Our office is in the center of Makati, in 6780 building Ayala Avenue, well out of the flood zone, and easy to get to. Sales strategy and plan

Managing accounts

Les Netizens incarnent la nouvelle humanité qui sort transformée de la révolution Internet, de nouveaux liens se tissent entre individus, entre individus et entreprises, qui est maintenant client de qui ? 

Netizencall s'inscrit dans ces nouveaux rapports entre les hommes et a pour motivation d'être le vecteur privilégié des entreprises qui veulent rester à l’unisson.

Prestataire de services multiculturel, pionnier de l’offshore en Europe de l’Est, Netizencall a à cœur de répondre à cette attente, de partager son expérience, sa passion du métier, son sens de l’appel et de la relation citoyenne. Et, qui mieux qu’un centre de contacts dans un petit pays émergent, à Chisinau, capitale discrète de la Moldavie, pour comprendre qu’il n’y a pas de frontière entre Netizens.

Description: Transformational Outsourcing and it`s Online Marketing Team was conceptualized in 2004 when the CEO Bob Levin who was then the CEO of Clay, Metal & Stone was on one of his extensive travels overseas, and he noticed a migration of back offices from the United States to the Philippines. After careful investigation, he decided to establish an overseas office for Clay Metal & Stone and after training, the office grew to 10 people which were accounting, order entry, inventory, quality control, graphic designers and product designers. The company then had its 24/7 operation and they were able to achieve and process business more efficiently resulting in their sales increasing to $6 million aside from having over 70 independent sales representatives with 5000 different customers. Because most small businesses do not have the marketing budgets that medium to large companies are accustomed to. Name: Defence Hub UK
Description:
The Defence Hub is the UK's first Enabler of Legal Services to Providers of Criminal Defence Legal Aid Services. 

Our function is to provide a complete criminal case file management service for the benefit of the end user, i.e. the defendant. From the defendants first appearance at the magistrates court, preparation & conduct of trial & where necessary representation at sentencing together with preparation & lodging of appeal where grounds are established. Every case file that the Defence Hub manages is fully cost drafted before being returned to our client, the legal aid provider for submission & final payment by the Legal Aid Agency (LAA) .

With 330 Criminal Defence Solicitors including 84 Criminal Solicitor Higher Court Advocates the Defence Hub is capable of delivering a higher quality of defence services to 148,000 square miles across England & wales.

Complete Criminal Defence Service
34% Reduction in Operational Costs Comparable to Current Provider System
Increase profit retained by Provider to 21.6%
Defence Hub Projected Annual Profit: 19%
4% pay rise to criminal defence solicitors & HCA's (based upon UK average of current criminal solicitor earnings)

The Defence Hub leads the way by basing its day to day operation on a trio of alternative business models already in operation in other areas of UK law and in other jurisdictions. 

We have merely adapted these more efficient practices to adapt better to the UK climate & criminal defence and also implemented cutting edge, highly secure IT systems bespoke to the operational requirements demanded by the UK's first Enabler of Criminal Defence Services.

Our business model will not only increase quality of services to the end user and deliver a better value service to the UK tax-payer but will increase the profits of criminal defence legal aid providers, lower unemployment rates within the UK legal sector & instil a greater financial value in accredited duty criminal solicitors.

Description:
“Een wereld met blije mensen is een warmere wereld om in te leven.”
Daar ben ik van overtuigd. Daarom verzorg ik contentmarketing voor ondernemers die met hun specialisatie ook bijdragen aan een blije wereld. Vaak extraverte mensen die zo’n naar buikgevoel krijgen als ze aan de slag gaan met planning en organisatie. Die de uren achter een laptop ervaren als straf en daarmee energie verliezen of kansen laten liggen. En ja, in veel gevallen zelfs allebei. 

Zelf vind ik het heerlijk alleen achter de laptop. Zonder afleiding lekker leesbare teksten schrijven, voor websites, social media of als ghostwriter van blogs. Met e-mailmarketing die boodschap bezorgen aan jouw doelgroep (ik beheers zowel Mailchimp als Active Campaign). En de derde pijler is jouw merk aantrekkelijk presenteren op social media (strategie, tekst + beeld en inplannen). 

Kennis delen zit in mijn DNA. Dus op mijn blog en social media lees je veel praktische tips over mijn specialisaties:
 Planning en organisatie.
 Timemanagement.
 Ondernemen.
 E-mailmarketing.
 Teksten schrijven.
 Social media.
 Slim werken met Office.

Tip: gebruik de knop Inschrijven om je aan te melden voor de vrolijkste e-mail in Nederland "Vlinderss in je Mailbox". Die ontvang je iedere laatste vrijdag van de maand met exclusieve tips en 4 x per jaar een toffe winactie. Afmelden kan natuurlijk bij ieder exemplaar. 

Opdrachtgevers maken ook regelmatig gebruik van mijn brainstormtalenten of stok-achter-de-deur kwaliteiten. En zeker als jouw organisatie een link met onderwijs heeft, laat ik je graag profiteren van mijn 30 jaar management assistent ervaring. Mijn didactische talenten zijn handig bij de workshops op maat, als je snel iets bij wilt leren. 

Meer informatie lees je op mijn website. Zie je kansen om samen te werken? Als opdrachtgever/opdrachtnemer of omdat je een gaaf aanbod hebt voor ondernemers? Neem gerust contact op. Ondernemen doe je samen!

Name: Rocket Outsourcing
Description:
The team at Rocket Outsourcing has years of experience in operational management, outsourcing, and establishing high performing teams for both enterprise and small businesses in Australia and the Philippines. We are passionate about helping businesses leverage the full capability of the Philippines and are laser focused on small and mid-size businesses.


We encourage businesses to take a closer look at their expenses and the way that they operate. Fortunately outsourcing and establishing remote capability in the Philippines is a tried and tested model that has enabled businesses of all sizes to grow and compete, at a greatly reduced cost. 

Globally there has been a huge shift toward homebased teams, and more flexible working arrangements. This should equate to further savings for businesses that already have established teams here. Unfortunately, that has not necessarily been the case, with service providers still charging for seat/office costs, even though their teams have been working from home since March 2020.

Rocket Outsourcing prides itself on flexibility and has adapted to the current situation swiftly with our customers in mind. We focus on building capability, not real-estate. Therefore, we partnered with one the largest office leasing companies in the Philippines, and now our customers have access to the largest network of modern, reliable and safe, shared and dedicated offices in the country. Our flexible home and office options mean you pay for what you need, and not our overheads.

Name: Paragon Call Centers
Description:
Paragon Call Centers is an international business process outsourcing (BPO) leader, with offices located in Barbados, Jamaica and Canada.

Introduction
Paragon provides turnkey Call Center offices used for the purpose of receiving and transmitting large volume of requests by telephone. The centralisation of call management aims to improve your company's operations and reduce costs, while providing a standardised, streamlined, uniform service for clients, making this approach ideal for companies with extensive call volumes. 

Services
Current call center operations are available 24/7 (7 days a week, 24 hours a day) and include incoming product support and outgoing calls for telemarketing, direct sales, lead generation, and debt collection. Value added services include forecasting of calls, determining shift-structures, and analysing customer call patterns. Reporting can be further broken down into real time reporting and historical reporting.

Sales
Current market conditions allow Paragon to provide our services at $8 - $15/hr per seat, depending on your requirements. For a detailed quote and more information about Paragon’s call center services and capabilities, contact us at 1-416-800-0615.

Name: Elegama
Description:
Somos una empresa peruana, constituida para la prestación de servicios de ingeniería, diseños, montajes, pruebas y puestas en servicios de subestaciones eléctricas de potencia y distribución; redes aéreas y subterráneas de alta, media y baja tensión. Fabricación y montaje de pórticos, torres y torretas para MT, AT y SET´s. Montaje de transformadores en SET´s, servicio de tratamiento de aceite en vacío en transformadores de potencia, etc.
En la actualidad en Lima, debido al crecimiento vertical de la ciudad, construir redes aéreas en AT se hace imposible debido al incumplimiento de las distancias mínimas de seguridad y al impacto arquitectónico. Por lo que ahora, las Distribuidoras de energía como Luz del Sur SAA y Edelnor SAA, así como la Transmisora ISA REP del PERU hán orientando casi todos sus diseños a nuevas redes subterráneas en 60kV, 138kV y 220kV. Es por ello que deseamos brindarle nuestros servicios de diseños e ingeniería en redes subterráneas AT, así como darles el soporte en ingeniería y técnico a todas las empresas fabricantes de cables, Terminales y Empalmes en AT. Como son TELEFONIKA, LS CABLE, VIAKON, BRUGG, PRYSMIAN, PFISTERER, TYCO, ABB, PRYSMIAN, G&W ELECTRIC, etc. Contamos con la experiencia, el personal de apoyo capacitado, con los equipos, las herramientas y sobre todo con el NOW HOW. Queremos que sus productos cable AT + Terminales autosoportados + Terminales enchufables a GIS ó Trafos de potencia + Empalmes para cables con pantalla crosbonding + Empalmes para cables con pantalla de conexión directa + cajas de puesta a tierra + abrazaderas amagnéticas queden en manos de especialistas que siempre le darán una solución a cualquier problema, ya que somos conocedores de nuestro trabajo. Esto redunda en la satisfacción de los clientes PFISTERER-SIEMENS-LDS, proyecto ejecutado en SET Los Industriales y Estudio e ingeniería de tramo subterráneo en 138kV desde SET Huanuco hasta torre de transicion P1N de los clientes EDEMSA&NEMETSA-ISA REP DEL PERU.

WORK PERMIT EXPERTISE

5. Our fees for handling your application are very affordable at a very competitive price.

6. We provide a "real-time after-sales services" to ensure that your employer avoids the possibility of contravening or not being in compliance with Taiwan regulations. EZ PERMIT consultants care for our clients by helping them avoid being involved in NIA's blacklists.

Name: My Virtual Partner
Description:
My Virtual Partner (MVP) was created to support small and mid-sized businesses in their selling, marketing and operational needs.

To succeed, business leaders must leverage their knowledge, experience and networks, and must get beyond day-to-day tasks to achieve their strategic vision for the company. But how do you do that when you’re buried in urgent tasks every day?

For decades, only large organizations have enjoyed access to overseas workers to leverage time and dollar savings for competitive advantage. Until now, it has been much more difficult for small and mid-sized businesses or even divisions within large organizations to tap into offshore talent. But if you run a business or a team within a bigger business, you recognize that as hard as you try, you can’t do everything yourself. Nor should you.

MVP offers a safe and affordable way to put time consuming but important work in the hands of skilled managers and professionals – without adding to your fixed costs. For a small fraction of what you would pay for equivalent talent in North America or Europe, you can access individual skilled workers or teams of hard-working, experienced professionals dedicated to your success. We help any business succeed by providing critical services with high quality and low costs.

Unlike most other outsourced services organizations, our philosophy is to truly understand your business and work with you, as a partner, to achieve results that will lead to better branding for your organization and more sales. For that reason, our teams are split between North America and India. Our account managers are experienced business professionals, all of whom reside in North America. They are on call to support your business and to make sure that your team in India understands your needs and delivers on time, to your specifications – every time.

Name: Outsourced Project Solutions
Description:
Outsourced Project Solutions (OPS) is a National Project Management Company that was established in 2015 in response to the trend in the logistics sector to outsource specific processes in a logistics chain.

At OPS we specialize in the outsourcing of non-core functions which are generally labour-intensive. These specific non-core activities are turned into a project, which is then resourced and completely managed by OPS.

OPS operates in a variety of different sectors which makes our company very diverse. Our projects focus on eliminating the variable cost of labour, as the client is only charged for the completed project. 

It also shifts the risk outlined by the LRA amendments regarding Temporary Employment Services (TES) from our clients to us; thus cuting down on HR/IR issues associated with hourly paid workers. 

OPS can also supply the relevant equipment needed to complete a project. By letting us supply the equipment needed, we are able to control the process flow while also managing and supervising the project. 

All work is charged out to the client on “Productivity Basis”; making budgeting and long term quoting much easier.

At OPS we ensure high levels of productivity, by incentivizing staff on their productivity.

Despite the many challenges facing the labour sector, here at Outsourced Project Solutions we have found a way to increase productivity of labour while at the same time avoid our clients having to deal with all the challenges labour brings to business.

Ofrecemos productos, soluciones, conocimiento y servicio.

El agua es hoy un bien escaso que precisa de una gestión sostenible del ciclo integral del agua. El binomio agua-energía necesita un planteamiento integral y multidisciplinar para el sostenimiento de una buena calidad ambiental. Por un consumo cada vez mayor de agua y energía.

Nuestro objetivo principal son las instalaciones, bienes de equipo para la gestión público-privada del agua. Infraestructuras y servicios, que requiere el ciclo integral del agua: captación, transporte, saneamiento, depuración y reutilización.

El ciclo integral del agua comprende desde la captación - aguas superficiales y aguas subterráneas, agua de mar y salobre - transporte, potabilización y tratamiento del agua acumulada en el medio natural hasta su distribución, recogida de las aguas usada para su posterior depuración y devolución al medio del que se ha obtenido en condiciones óptimas que no perjudiquen al medioambiente.
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Las Palmas

Name: Working Well Early Help
Description:
MAXIMUS is a global leader in health and employment services. In the UK, we have operations in over 270 locations across England, Scotland and Wales and employ over 3,800 highly trained staff to deliver employment, disability and health services to more than two million people each year.

We partner with the UK Government, private sector businesses as well as charitable organisations to provide easy-to-navigate, customer-focused and effective services that support our communities and deliver on our promise to our clients.

Throughout the UK, we help devolved administrations and local government with the delivery of public health and employment support service programmes.

Our delivery of the Working Well Early Help programme, under MAXIMUS HealthWorks, provides free specialist support to people with a disability or health condition who are struggling at work, on sick leave, or newly unemployed in Greater Manchester. 

Suitable for those working for small and medium enterprises, large employers, as well as the public sector, this support includes:
* Health, wellbeing and lifestyle
* Skills, education and training
* Help in work
* Housing
* Finding work
* Workplace adjustments
* A return to work plan.

The programme is jointly commissioned by Greater Manchester Combined Authority and the Greater Manchester Health and Social Care Partnership. It is delivered by MAXIMUS HealthWorks, Pathways CIC and part funded by the European Social Fund.

For more information about the Working Well Early Help programme, or how we can work in partnership with you, get in touch with us via:
T: 0300 456 8107
E: workingwellearlyhelp@maximusuk.co.uk
W: www.workingwellearlyhelp.co.uk

Does Facebook escape you? Are you absent from your Alumni database? Leave it to your assistant. While you’re out meeting with clients and servicing their needs, SalesSupport360 is behind the scenes everyday making new connections for you. JAK DZIAŁAMY?

ThreeZones to nasza odpowiedź na obecną sytuację na rynku pracy. Jako menedżerowie współpracujący na co dzień z klientami biznesowymi, wielokrotnie mieliśmy okazję przekonać się, że coraz więcej firm w Polsce ma problem z zabezpieczeniem odpowiedniej ilości wykwalifikowanych pracowników.

Przedsiębiorstwa nie chcą już martwić się o ciągłość produkcji, czy przyjmowanie i planową realizację kolejnych projektów. Deficyt personelu dotyczy obecnie głównie branży produkcyjnej (w tym szczególnie automotive, AGD/RTV, produkcji spożywczej) oraz logistyki i branży budowlanej.

Wiemy, że rozwiązaniem jest potencjał pracowników z krajów Europy Wschodniej. Mają oni odpowiednie kompetencje i determinację do pracy. Wiedzieliśmy też, że oferowane dotąd na rynku rozwiązania z zakresu outsourcingu pracowniczego nie są idealne.

W oparciu o nasze doświadczenia, analizy i znajomość branży stworzyliśmy kompleksowe rozwiązania. Zabezpieczają one potrzeby biznesowe firm oraz stwarzają atrakcyjne i stabilne warunki pracy dla pracowników ze Wschodu.
Uzupełnieniem stworzonego przez nas sprawdzonego modelu biznesowego ThreeZones jest kompleksowa obsługa pracowników. Zapewniamy wstępne badania lekarskie szkolenia BHP, wyposażenie w odzież roboczą, zakwaterowanie, wsparcie tłumacza i in.

Na rynku wyróżniają nas także autorskie, nowoczesne narzędzia informatyczne. Ułatwiają one naszym partnerom biznesowym zarządzanie codzienną pracą personelu i przedsiębiorstwa.

Obecnie budujemy sieć oddziałów franczyzowych, aby skuteczniej docierać do naszych klientów i zapewnić im stały dostęp do wykwalifikowanej kadry pracowników.

Name: Baker Industries
Description:
At Baker Industries, we believe workplaces and communities are strengthened when they are diverse and inclusive of individuals who are often sidelined based on their challenges. Our workforce development program is designed to unlock each person’s unique potential and provide a sense of purpose to adults with barriers to employment.

Recognizing that success in the regular workforce is often more difficult for adults with challenges, our mission is to offer workforce opportunities to:

Adults challenged by intellectual and/or physical disability
Adults on parole/probation
Adults with substance use disorder who are in an active recovery program
Adults struggling with housing insecurity

Our innovative model was devised by Charlie and Weezie Baker over 40 years ago to provide “real” work for their son, Justin, who is challenged by disability.

At each of our light industrial facilities, program participants perform real work for real customers across the Philadelphia region. In exchange, they receive a regular hourly wage and the opportunity to engage in workshops, social events, support groups and more designed to help them build the knowledge, skills and confidence they need to succeed in the workplace. Each year, dozens progress to a good job in the regular economy!

Dialoga con i titolari o col responsabile del personale di Aziende che operano in diversi settori, fornendo personale Generico e/o Specializzato.

Name: TFS- Tanzania Facilitation Services
Description:
Most organizations don’t struggle because people are incapable. They struggle because roles, systems, and decision-making are unclear.

When clarity is missing, even capable teams slow down. Misalignment shows up as performance issues, conflict, or repeated frustration, and the default response is often more training, more rules, or more pressure.

Our work focuses on helping organisations surface these underlying gaps and create practical structures that support performance. We do this through structured facilitation, HR systems, and operational alignment. All of which is grounded in real organisational context, not theory.

We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. We believe in:

- Clarity before action
- Systems before blame
- Alignment before acceleration

At Tanzania Facilitation Services (TFS), we work with organizations that are growing, changing, or feeling operational strain, to help them move from confusion to clarity in how people work together.

This work is quiet, structured, and intentional. And when done well, it changes how decisions are made and how teams perform.

Name: PB Outsource Ltd
Description:
PB Outsource are Outsourcing Consultants, managing the selection, appointment & performance of all your company’s outsourced functions, so you can focus on your core business.
We offer years of experience in selecting the right outsource supplier for your business, ensuring rapid response, best fit & best value.
Who are we?
Our directors have over 30 years of experience in business of all sizes, predominately working within and owning SME’s. We have extensive knowledge of IT & Recruitment and all have a service focused background.
As a business we are keen on developing relationships and delivering quality service. All directors are experienced in using many suppliers to solve complex problems.

What do we do? 
By using our database, speaking to our network of contacts and carrying out detailed market research we will identify suitable suppliers for you to outsource to. Then by conducting robust investigations and due diligence into the profile and attributes of potential suppliers, we will present the best options to you, providing testimonials, pricing and justification of their capabilities.

When do you use us?
-	When you need support on a new project but lack in-house expertise
-	When you recognize you can do something more quickly, cheaply or efficiently if you have the right support.
-	If you feel an existing supplier isn’t providing the quality or value for money you expect

How do you use us?
Speak to us about the project or service. Discuss timescales, budgets and current options
We present the best solutions
You take it or leave it. No obligation. No charge for the work we have done providing you do not engage a recommended supplier.
If the best solution is to use our proposals as leverage to renegotiate terms with an existing supplier, we can renegotiate for you and we will charge a percentage of the cost saving as a fee.

Name: Bridgin.co
Description:
Bridgin a été créé en 2017, et est un site de mise en relation entre des entreprises et des prestataires pour des missions de quelques heures à plusieurs mois.

Cette entreprise est née de l’idée que passer par un freelance apporte de la flexibilité, de la rapidité, et de la facilité.
Ainsi, pour vous faciliter la tâche notre site est intuitif. Une assistance est à votre disposition gratuitement pour vous aider à mettre en place vos missions.

Nous trouvons des freelances disponibles immédiatement, avec des tarifs préférentiels puisque faire appel à un freelance à un coût du travail inférieur comparé à un travailleur employé de manière classique. De plus, nous proposons une estimation du coût que cela représente pour vous, défiant toutes concurrences !

Bridgin sélectionne pour vous, les profils qui correspondent au mieux à la mission et s’occupe des procédures administratives. Il suffit de décrire la mission et vos attentes afin que nous choisissions les bridgers qui correspondent à la mission. Afin de pouvoir nous rejoindre et postuler, chaque bridger passe par un processus strict et ciblé de qualification.

À tout moment, vous pouvez solliciter un ou plusieurs freelance pour un projet particulier ou une période prédéfinie.

Description:
Connect Call Honduras,  provides complete Inbound, Outbound, Electronic and Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) call center services. We offer customized solutions for your business needing a call center and answering service.

You can use our services to extend your reach into new markets, have stronger customer support and even retain your existing customers. By outsourcing to us, your business will benefit by minimizing staffing and overhead costs.

Our services fall in the 4 basic categories:

Inbound Call Center Services – We TAKE the calls for you.
Outbound Call Center Services – We MAKE the calls for you.
Automated (Electronic) Call Center Services – We AUTOMATE processes for you.
Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) Call Center Services – You DELEGATE the business process to us.


Simple Rental Solutions' Services:

Inbound Services – We TAKE the Calls for You
Inbound services focuses on taking the incoming phone calls to your business and/or organization. Many inbound services include: telephone answering, order processing, dispatch and help desk services.

Outbound Services – We MAKE the Calls for You
Outbound services focuses on making the outgoing phone calls for your business and/or organization. Many outbound services include: telesales, telemarketing and market research.


Automated (Electronic) Services – We AUTOMATE Processes for You
Electronic call center services are about automating processes for your business or organization. Examples include: interactive voice response (IVR), voicemail and dealer locator. 

Business Process Outsourcing (BPO)  Services – You DELEGATE the Business Process to Us
BPO call center services are when you delegate the entire business process to us. Any inbound, outbound or electronic service can be entirely outsourced. However, examples of commonly outsourced services include:  fulfillment, email management and faxing.
