Name: Grupo Blindek
Description:
¿QUE ES BLINDEK?

GRUPO BLINDEK es una empresa dedicada al desarrollo de Sistemas de protección industrial y comercial a base de recubrimientos y soluciones de poco o nulo impacto ambiental; que faciliten el mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo, sin arriesgar la salud de los trabajadores o al medio ambiente. 

¿COMO ACTÚAN LOS SISTEMAS BLINDEK?

Toda materia, por compacta que sea, está formada por moléculas de diversos elementos químicos.   Los espacios intermoleculares están ocupados a su vez por moléculas de oxígeno, hidrogeno y diversos gases. Nuestros compuestos desplazan y ocupan el lugar intermolecular de dichos gases por intercambio iónico y al no existir oxigeno e hidrogeno no se realiza la combustión u oxidación de los sustratos; Es decir, al aplicar los productos BLINDEK en sustratos como el cartón, la madera, los textiles o metales se provocan el intercambio iónico a nivel molecular, al no existir oxígeno, no hay creación de flama, no hay propagación de fuego y no hay corrosión.
Todos nuestros sistemas poseen la habilidad de adaptarse a la expansión, contracción y desgarre de los sustratos sometidos a cambios de temperatura o uso, también poseen capas con mayor amplitud milimétrica que incrementan la capacidad de protección rebasando los estándares comerciales.

NUESTROS PRODUCTOS.

Actualmente contamos con quince (15) productos especializados y 5 desarrollos especiales.
En GRUPO BLINDEK reducimos la pérdida de recursos reforzando las características de nuestros sistemas de protección e integrado adherentes especializados para aplicar en un mismo sistema en diferentes sustratos; de esta forma, una vez mas, economizamos recursos al disminuir la perdida de materiales.

Name: Stagecoach Payroll Solutions
Description:
Stagecoach Payroll Solutions takes a proactive approach to payroll processing. We will take the time to ask the right questions to ensure your payroll is processed accurately. Our unique software allows us to create as many custom income and deduction codes as required to allow you to keep your records organized. We will also work closely with your accountant or your bookkeeper to keep your payroll current.
Payroll service companies are not all created equal. Stagecoach Payroll Solutions is committed to providing the best client experience possible. If you currently use a payroll service provider, ask yourself these questions:
Does your current provider ask the right questions, or do they just process whatever you send them?
Am I receiving the level of service I would like to have?
Am I receiving personalized service to meet my needs?
Is my representative knowledgeable and answers all my payroll questions or concerns?
Is your payroll processed by someone who holds a payroll designation?
Are you confident that your payroll is compliant?
Do you have a good relationship with your representative?
Is your payroll audited regularly or only annually?
These are important concerns when working with a payroll service provider. Many of these points are important to consider as well if you are starting a business or going to bring on staff and want your payroll to be properly managed.
We will help you succeed with your business by utilizing our expertise in providing payroll solutions for your company. Please contact us today to find out more.

Name: Outsourcing j.d.o.o.
Description:
Outsourcing is a Croatian company dedicated to provide outsourcing services to its clients.
We strive to always be there to support our partners in their core business and to follow them wherever their business takes them. We want to be our partner’s shadow, always there, in the background, invisible… dependable.

Reason for Outsourcing
Companies may decide to outsource in order to provide their clients with better service which otherwise they could not afford. Young companies may find Outsourcing as a great solution in the beginning when the company is fragile and still needs to establish itself on the market. Outsourcing can be a good solution to the companies that needs to make internal savings which otherwise may force them to cut on services that they are providing to their clients. Companies outsource to avoid various types of costs. 
Outsourcing can offer greater budget flexibility and control. 
Outsourcing lets companies pay for only the services they need, when they need them. Among the reasons companies elect to outsource include the avoidance of regulations, high taxes, high energy costs, and costs associated with defined benefits in labor-union contracts and taxes for government-mandated benefits. This motivates companies to outsource for lower labor costs.
Outsourcing creates internal savings which can than focus money and resources towards core business and/or increase their profit even more.

How do we do it
Every company has not only its own needs and requirements but also their own way of doing business. Individual approach to each partner is the only way that guaranties the highest quality level of service that we can provide.  Our solutions are tailor made to suit our partner’s needs. Our mission is always to implement the best outsourcing solution to every partner.

A diferencia de la Teledetección tradicional, nuestra tecnología, creada por CETAET, no hace uso de softwares, sino que se basa en la generación de algoritmos específicos, confeccionados para cada estudio en particular sobre la base de las propiedades geométricas y espectrales de los elementos a monitorear, ya sea en el espectro óptico, o radar (SAR) en el caso de monitoreos subterráneos.

Name: BANGLADESHNEXT.NL
Description:
Heroverweegt u uw benadering van het IT-sourcing vraagstuk?

Bangladesh is in opkomst als bestemming voor uitbesteding binnen de IT industrie. De economie van het land bloeit op met een hoge groei van het BNP. Met Engels als co-officiële taal van het land, is Bangladesh een aantrekkelijke en toegankelijke locatie voor internationale bedrijven.   
In de afgelopen jaren, heeft Gartner Bangladesh beoordeeld als één van de top 30 IT uitbestedingsbestemmingen in de wereld.  Goldman Sachs heeft Bangladesh op de lijst gezet als één van de ‘Volgende Elf’ landen voor zijn economische potentieel en de Europese Unie heeft Bangladesh als één van de top 20 bestemmingen voor uitbesteding ingedeeld.
Eén van de meest belangrijke voordelen van Bangladesh als uitbestedingsbestemming is zijn jonge ambitieuze bevolking. Jonge mensen in Bangladesh zijn goed getraind en opgeleid, en bieden veelgevraagde technische kennis en vaardigheden.
Terwijl de kosten in traditionele uitbestedingsbestemmingen zoals India, Oost-Europa, de Filippijnen en China stijgen, groeit de aantrekkingskracht van Bangladesh als uitbestedingsbestemming, door de lage personeels- en infrastructuurkosten. 
Bangladesh heeft een moderne infrastructuur. Daarnaast, zijn er verschillende overheidsprikkels voor de IT sector, die de aantrekkingskracht nog verder verhogen.
Het aantal Nederlandse ICT bedrijven dat graag diensten uitbesteed in Bangladesh stijgt. Dit jaar hebben hoogstaande handelsdelegaties uit Nederland in verschillende sectoren potentiële gebieden voor samenwerking met bedrijven uit Bangladesh onderzocht. 
Geïnteresseerd om te onderzoeken welke mogelijkheden Bangladesh te bieden heeft? Maak dan gebruik van onze  unieke mogelijkheid om door de een agentschap vd VN (ITC) voorgeselecteerde en getrainde bedrijven te ontmoeten.

Notre site internet, la-paie-externalisee.com assume, à votre place, la gestion de paie des salariés, via un accès sécurisé sur Internet, au logiciel de paie :
Vous communiquez ou saisissez chaque mois vos variables de paie (nombre de jours de congés / modification du salaire, absences, nombre de tickets restaurant… / fin de contrat / rupture de contrat)
Nous vous adressons, sous 48 heures, vos différents éléments de paie par courrier ou par mail sous format PDF.

- l’établissement des bulletins de salaires
- toutes les déclarations sociales
- le paiement dématérialisé (EDI) des charges sociales
- les attestations de salaires (maladie / maternité / accident du travail)
- les documents de fin de contrat CDD / CDI (solde de tout compte, certificat de travail, attestation pôle emploi)
- la veille Code du travail / convention collective
- l’assistance au contrôle URSSAF
- l’édition de vos tableaux de bord et de vos statistiques.

Treinamentos:
     Treinamentos para controlador de acesso, vigia industrial, fiscal de loja e segurança no trabalho.
     Com avaliação prévia do local e normas internas para elaboração de formação personalizada, utilizando material didático personalizado, slides, vídeos, dinâmicas e atividades. Depois do treinamento damos suporte durante um mês para ajudarmos com possíveis dúvidas, e neste período nos colocamos a disposição para uma palestra aos demais funcionários ou aos moradores do condomínio sobre a a formação aplicada e dicas de segurança.

Exxpa is a procurement management partner that helps manufacturers win complex, high-value public tenders across Europe. We specialize in custom-made products—such as soldier systems, PPE, and technical equipment—where technical precision and local knowledge matter most.

Our primary clients are national Ministries of Defence (MOD) and Interior (MOI), where procurement demands are high-stakes and specification-driven. Operating across the Baltics and expanding into Central and Northern Europe, we lead the full procurement process from opportunity identification to contract execution.

Unlike consultants or distributors, we take ownership of the outcome while our partners contract directly with public authorities—ensuring clarity, compliance, and financial security.

Our model unlocks new revenue for manufacturers without needing local sales teams or navigating unfamiliar systems. With Exxpa, more tenders become accessible—and more of them get won.

Name: Kusheee.com The home for Legal Marijuana's biggest fans
Description:
Legal recreational marijuana is finally here! With it comes a need for the industry to blossom. We need to act professionally and showcase excellence in the legal marijuana industry. With our 30+ years experience working with some of the largest global companies, our aim here is to bring professional marketing, branding and excellence into the legal marijuana industry. Our goal is to provide marijuana growers and dispensaries with custom branded packaging and jurisdictional legal compliance with regards to child safe packaging products. We also will bring to market a custom designed line of accessories that achieve the highest safety and social compliance. With the opening up of the industry, comes many opportunities but we have seen that there are suppliers in the industry that are bringing unsafe products to market that hurt marijuana's long term growth potential. Our focus is to bring the industry out of it's illicit past and into a new realm of acceptance and excellence.

Our mission is captured in the 3 e's in our name. To help educate people about the industry and begin a new, positive narrative. To encourage excellence in the industry with high standards and professionalism. And to encourage entrepreneurialism within the legal marijuana industry by helping new companies come to market and the stalwarts in the industry to attract new markets and extend their brands to further grow.

We are also currently starting one of the first incubator programmes focussed exclusively in the legal marijuana industry. If you are interested and joining us and bringing your idea to the marijuana market, please contact us with your business idea and plans. We offer the right individuals: investment, business and manufacturing training to bring your ideas to market and connection to clients in 20+ countries. Contact us today!

Name: ANAGHA DIGITECH PVT LTD
Description:
ANAGHA'S professionals are adept at managing the entire content publishing lifecycle, including graphic design, pagination, foolproof editing, proofing, and keyboarding for a variety of industry verticals such as medical, legal, financial etc.

Our prepress service offerings include the following -


Typesetting Services
We understand how important it is to compose crisp and clean layouts to deliver the intended message clearly to the reader. Our skilled typesetters are experienced in all forms of conventional typesetting, ensuring a wide range of typesetting options to choose from - be it less complex pagination levels or complex design projects. We offer typesetting services in multiple languages for both print and digital media.

Prepress Production Services
Our prepress production services serve as a one-stop-shop to take a print job from initial concept and design to the printing press; be it a book, brochure, direct mailer, or any other printed matter. Our attention to detail ensures accurate file preparation and color manipulation according to the client's requirements. At all stages of the process, we ensure to keep the client within the loop regarding the final deliverable, which is then delivered electronically via FTP or VPN.

Proofing Services
Proofing plays a very important role and once approved, the proof serves as a binding contract between them and the printing company. Our trained experts check proofs for complete correctness, including checking and verifying digits and details such as URL's, color accuracy, bleed and trim marks, image positioning, etc.

Content Digitization Services
Our content digitization services are perfect for clients who have large volumes of documents that needs to electronically converted which requires manpower to accurately and efficiently enter data manually. Our service is cost-effective and tailored to meet various publishing styles and requirements, while keeping in mind urgent deadlines.

Name: NORDEST LINE
Description:
Nordest Line è un’azienda di metallizzazione e verniciatura industriale di semilavorati in plastica, vetro e, occasionalmente, semilavorati di piccole dimensioni in metallo.

I semilavorati possono essere interessati da due percorsi produttivi: un primo percorso prevede un trattamento con impianti semiautomatici e termina nella fase finale dell’alto vuoto in metallizzazione; un secondo percorso prevede per i manufatti una verniciatura automatica o manuale.

Nordest Line contribuisce alla realizzazione di prodotti nei mercati alimentari, automotive, dell’arredamento, della cosmetica e molti altri ancora.

Le materie prime utilizzate per la metallizzazione e verniciatura industriale dei prodotti, in relazione agli adempimenti del Regolamento (CE) n. 1907/2006 del 18 dicembre 2006, concernente la registrazione, la valutazione, l’autorizzazione e la restrizione delle sostanze chimiche (REACH), SONO PRIVE di sostanze identificate dall’Agenzia Europea come “very high concern” (SVHC).


BIDONEDESIGN
La continua attenzione all’ambiente ci ha motivato nell’ideazione di un progetto che trasformasse uno scarto in un nuovo prodotto di valore: nasce Bidone Design (www.bidonedesign.it).
Il progetto nasce dalla volontà di ridurre le ripercussioni ambientali provocate dalle attività di verniciatura, portando nuovo valore per l’ambiente e la collettività.
Il Bidone si rivela un prodotto adatto a diversi impieghi e destinazioni, mantenendo in ogni circostanza invariata la sua estetica contemporanea e funzionalità.

Name: 3C - Compensation Consulting Consortium
Description:
OUR FIRM
3C―Compensation Consulting Consortium―is a full-service compensation consulting firm that is focused on establishing effective total reward programs to enhance the value of your business.  We are compensation professionals whose interactive approach to client consulting is based on a wealth of compensation experience in corporate and consulting environments.  3C is owned by its employees and completely independent.  Each project is led by a 3C partner so that a client’s primary contact is the individual accountable for the project’s success. 

OUR SERVICES
Some of our prevalent offerings include:
•	Total compensation strategy development to determine how an organization wishes to pay its employees and why.
•	Total compensation market assessment and gap analysis to understand the competitiveness of compensation offerings.  This includes custom surveys, as well as extensive market research on the total compensation offered by comparable organizations for comparable positions.
•	Business performance assessment.  We help identify performance metrics that drive your organization’s success and then assist in determining the appropriate pay and performance relationship.
•	Program design focused on base pay, variable pay, equity, deferred compensation and performance management programs that are aligned with an organization’s strategy and objectives.     
•	Program implementation to assist when your organization introduces a new compensation program to your internal audience.
•	Compensation outsourcing.  Our Compensation Investment Management Services (CIMS) provides full outsourcing capabilities for all areas of compensation administration and management.

OUR APPROACH
We measure our own success by each client’s success and satisfaction with the outcome of a 3C consulting engagement.  Our consulting approach is a process, not a single product.  We focus on understanding your organization, its compensation programs and related issues.  In addition, we address the fine balance between performance and pay.  

3C uses experience to guide in-depth research and analysis that confirm and validate a solution.  Our consultants know how to plan, design, implement and administer compensation plans for all levels of your organization.  Our solutions are straightforward, easy to understand and flexible.  Equally important, our programs are designed to anticipate staff and organizational change.

OUR CONSULTANTS
3C provides an experienced team for each consulting engagement that is led by a partner and a senior consultant.  Our staff by office includes:

> Chicago - Lisa Audi, Brian Enright, Jon Mumaw, Mike Plecki, Mark Reilly 	
> Indianapolis - Sue Anthony
> Pittsburgh - Dawn Cumpston, Jennifer Gligonic

Name: Designhill Asia
Description:
photo retoucher and content creator


In today's digital age, visual content has become an essential component of any successful marketing strategy. From social media posts to advertising campaigns, businesses rely heavily on eye-catching visuals to capture the attention of their target audience. This is where the role of a photo retoucher and content creator comes in.

A photo retoucher is a skilled professional who uses specialized software to enhance the appearance of photographs. They work closely with photographers, graphic designers, and art directors to ensure that the final product meets the desired aesthetic standards. Photo retouchers may remove blemishes, adjust colors and lighting, and even manipulate images to create a specific mood or effect.

On the other hand, a content creator is responsible for producing original, engaging content for various platforms such as social media, blogs, and websites. This includes written content, images, and videos that are designed to capture the attention of the target audience and promote a particular brand or product. Content creators may work independently or as part of a marketing team, and they often collaborate with graphic designers and photographers to produce high-quality visual content.

Name: Programmes for NGOs
Description:

Our team of experienced programme specialists are on hand to cover the entirety of your programme needs, ensuring quality, compliance and delivering success. The team has global experience operating from various contexts, languages and for multiple NGOs.

We do that through providing three services: 
1. Programme Outsourcing and Direct Project Implementation 
Managing and overseeing the effective delivery of programme operations is extremely costly. Moreover, with the rapidly evolving sector, we now require even further expertise and higher benchmarks. It’s no surprise that charities struggle to afford adequate team of programme personnel for global management. This gap is most prominent when charities that manage to raise significant funding but fail to source the human and financial capacities required for scale up and delivery of raised funds.  
Programmes for NGOs will fill any vacuum and rapidly manage all, or some, of your programme function on your behalf, ensuring compliance while value for money.

2. Programme Support
Is your charity struggling to effectively manage it programmes and staying compliant? That could be related to policies, processes, forms, due diligence, projects data storage & retrieve, donor compliance, reporting, delivery partners…etc. With years of experience in project & programme management, we have the capabilities and expertise to put the right programmatic foundations in place.

3. Connect with Trusted & Qualified Local Partners
Are you looking for reliable and trusted local partners in Afghanistan, Indonesia, Iraq, Lebanon, Pakistan, Palestine, Somalia, Syria and more? In line with the localisation agenda, we will link your organisation with reliable local partners on the ground. All our local partners go through rigorous process of due diligence.

I servizi, offerti agli Istituti Finanziari e agli Assicuratori, prevedono l’analisi dei dati, il monitoraggio degli eventi e la loro gestione, servizi statistici e la conduzione di programmi di fidelizzazione.
QuintoJob agisce tramite la sua sede operativa di Milano, utilizzando i più innovativi sistemi informatici di gestione e impiegando risorse umane specificamente formate, in modo tale da sostituirsi ai propri clienti nella creazione di funzioni di monitoraggio e controllo.
Gli obiettivi principali che QuintoJob si prefigge sono: fornire una gestione precisa e puntuale, utile alla valutazione degli andamenti del business; fidelizzare, a mezzo di servizi mirati, la clientela degli Istituti Finanziari e degli Assicuratori.
QuintoJob persegue, inoltre, una continua attività di studio e analisi dei mercati di riferimento, al fine d’individuare bisogni e necessità delle società in essi operanti, con l’intento finale di creare servizi di alto valore aggiunto.

Name: MIROMAX, s.r.o.
Description:
Spoločnosť MIROMAX, s.r.o. bola založená v roku 1994 ako servisná prevádzka hasiacich prístrojov a hadicových zariadení. Sídlo spoločnosti je v Banskej Bystrici. Od roku 1998 sme začali poskytovať služby v protipožiarnej ochrane a bezpečnosti práce. Cez vytvorenú sieť regionálnych  pobočiek v Žiline, Košiciach a Bratislave dokážeme poskytnúť naše služby vo všetkých regiónoch Slovenska.

Od roku 2003 riešime komplexne otázky ochrany pred požiarmi a bezpečnosti práce pre našich zákazníkov od vypracovania projektu, jeho realizáciu a dodávku, až po údržbu a servis v nasledujúcom časovom období.

Ponúkame celý sortiment protipožiarnych zariadení / hasiace prístroje, hadicové zariadenia, tabuľky a iné/ s možnosťou zliav pre veľkoodberateľov. Vlastníme oprávnenia na predaj a servis od väčšiny výrobcov a dovozcov hasiacej techniky pôsobiacich na našom trhu.

Pre pohostinstvá, reštaurácie a hotely ponúkame fľaše na potravinársku CO2 s následným znovunaplnením. CO2 fľaše ponúkame aj na technické účely (zváranie).

 

V našej spoločnosti pôsobí viacero odborníkov v oblasti ochrany pred požiarmi a bezpečnosti práce, ktorý majú dlhoročné skúsenosti v tejto náročnej problematike.

Novinkou v ponuke našich služieb je zabezpečenie riešenia problematiky civilnej ochrany a podnikového životného prostredia.

Name: Futura Conservadora
Description:
Há mais de uma década no mercado de terceirização de serviços em Brasília/DF, a FUTURA CONSERVADORA é uma empresa inovadora e preparada para atender clientes exigentes de pequeno, médio e grande porte, oferecendo soluções inteligentes e econômicas, com agilidade e rapidez.

Atuando no mercado Condominial e Empresarial, fornecemos uma enorme gama de serviços a fim de facilitar o cotidiano do tomador dos serviços, prestados sempre com a excelência que o cliente merece.

A FUTURA conta com profissionais qualificados, criteriosamente selecionados para as funções a serem desempenhadas, passando constantemente por reciclagem sempre visando aprimorar e melhor adequar nossos serviços às exigências do cliente.

Praticamos os melhores preços do mercado, eis que entendemos ser possível a prestação de serviços por um valor justo, sem onerar desnecessariamente nosso cliente. Assim, inegavelmente possuímos o melhor custo-benefício do mercado na esfera da terceirização de mão de obra voltada a limpeza e conservação. Muito se deve a uma enorme rede de parceiros com os quais contamos o que nos possibilita entregar ao tomador dos serviços uma maior quantia de serviços agregados ao contrato, muitos deles a título de cortesia.

Durante a execução dos nossos serviços realizamos apoio integral ao Cliente, 24hs por dia/ 07 dias na semana.

Ao firmar contrato de terceirização de serviços com a FUTURA, o cliente contará com cortesias exclusivas para o seu Condomínio/Empresa, o que nos torna um diferencial dentre as demais empresas do segmento.

A FUTURA encontra-se plenamente regular com suas obrigações legais, razão pela qual, buscando estabelecer uma relação de transparência com nossos clientes e empregados, apresentamos mensalmente as respectivas Certidões de regularidade emitidas pelos mais diversos Órgãos.

Outro diferencial da FUTURA CONSERVADORA é o mais elevado respeito para com os seus colaboradores, cumprindo tempestiva e rigorosamente com suas obrigações de natureza trabalhista, atendendo sempre aos ditames da lei.

Além de uma prestação realizada com presteza e eficiência, procuramos sempre atuar de maneira próxima ao gestor condominial ou gerente empresarial, um diferencial no mercado da conservação e limpeza.

Agende uma visita ou solicite uma proposta!

Name: Global Human Capital Development Council (GHCDC)
Description:
Global Human Capital Development Council (GHCDC) is dedicated to fostering a resilient and innovative human capital ecosystem that empowers individuals and organizations globally to achieve their full potential. With a vision centered on creating equitable opportunities for skill development, career progression, and organizational growth, GHCDC strives to revolutionize human capital development as a key driver for sustainable economic prosperity. Committed to lifelong learning, inclusivity, and technological advancement, GHCDC collaborates with diverse stakeholders to nurture human talent and bridge workforce gaps worldwide.

The primary objectives of the Global Human Capital Development Council (GHCDC) are as follows:

Inclusive Human Capital Ecosystem: GHCDC seeks to build an inclusive ecosystem that ensures equal access to skill development, career opportunities, and resources, meeting the needs of both individuals and organizations.

Equitable Talent Development: The council envisions promoting equitable growth in talent development by addressing disparities in access to education, training, and career advancement across different demographics.

Transformative Growth: GHCDC aims to lead transformative growth within human capital development, fostering a dynamic, outcome-driven approach to skill building and workforce empowerment.

Commitment to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI): A core focus of GHCDC is on promoting DEI within the human capital landscape, striving to create diverse talent pipelines and eliminate structural barriers faced by underrepresented groups.

Strategic Collaboration: GHCDC places a strong emphasis on partnership, working closely with governments, educational institutions, businesses, and non-profit organizations to maximize the impact of human capital initiatives.

Elevate Workforce Quality: GHCDC is committed to improving the quality of the workforce by advocating for fair compensation, supportive work environments, and opportunitie

Name: Infinity Services ApS
Description:
Outsourcing for 70 DKK i timen. 

I en virksomhed kan administrative aktiviteter håndteres internt eller være outsourcet til en serviceleverandør. Årsager til at outsource skyldes f.eks. ønske om fokus på kerneforretningen, forbedre servicekvaliteten, reducere omkostningerne og minimere risici. Outsourcing fører til styringsmæssig forenkling – effektiviseringer – og mere professionelle services. I Infinity Services er vi selvfølgelig klar over at outsourcing er en beslutning, som kræver grundige overvejelser og hvor I ønsker høj grad af sikkerhed. Vi er også klar over at der er argumenter for og imod outsourcing og vi er indstillet på en objektiv drøftelse af disse forhold med jer – for hvert enkelt serviceområde, inden vi påbegynder en outsourcingprocess. Personlig tillid og kemi er den første forudsætning. Den næste forudsætning er et sikkert fagligt fundament. Vores serviceleverance gennemgår en struktureret process, som er funderet i grundigt forarbejde inden selve outsourcingen finder sted.

Der er serviceopgaver, som det er vigtigt for jer selv at kontrollere. Men f.eks kedelige. rutineopgaver, tastearbejde, data mining og opfølgning er velegnede til Virtuel Outsourcing. Praktisk talt alle områder, som er tidskrævende, men ikke nødvendigvis behøves at varetages af medarbejdere placeret i Danmark. Virtuel Outsourcing egner sig til områder, der ikke indeholder viden, som er kritisk i forhold til jeres kerneopgaver.
 
Infinity Services medarbejdere er placeret i Indien, Fillipinerne og Vietnam. Størstedelen af vores medarbejdere er højtudannede, faglige dygtige og har et ønske om at levere en god service. Jeres kontanktperson er placeret i Danmark og for at lette processen er hans jeres Single-Point-Of-Contact (SPOC), således at I ikke skal bruge tid på at have dialogen med medarbejdere på den anden side af kloden. Der er desuden lavet hemmeligholdelseserklæringer (NDA'er) med vores medarbejdere. Alt dette for at minimere jeres risiko.

Name: CoStaff - Tijdelijk & Buitenlands Personeel
Description:
CoStaff staat voor tijdelijk en buitenlands personeel dat hard werkt. Wij zijn een bedrijf met principes. Die principes hebben ons gebracht waar we nu zijn: in slechte tijden doen we geen rare dingen en in goede tijden evenmin. We hechten dan ook veel waarde aan administratieve discipline en organisatie.

Iets beloven is eenvoudig, het consequent nakomen van beloften vergt een strakke organisatie en heldere communicatie. Dat werkt zo bij ons intern en ook richting onze klanten. Hard en duidelijk, maar fair, zijn we ook over onze tarieven. Wij zijn niet de duurste, maar ook niet de goedkoopste. We hanteren een faire prijs en staan voor onze tarieven. Uit principe verlagen we niet onze tarieven, omdat verlagen altijd ten koste gaat van onze klant of van onze mensen. Wij staan voor onze kwaliteit, u staat voor het gewenste resultaat – u betaalt een eerlijke prijs en wij leveren wat we beloven.

De dag dat wij een urenfabriek of meschenschuivers worden, sluiten we onze deuren, dat spreken we met elkaar af. Natuurlijk hebben we commerciële belangen, toch worden wij niet gedreven door euro's maar juist door passie. Door de kick sneller, efficiënter, flexibeler, beter te zijn dan een ander. We willen verwachtingen overtreffen en vooroordelen over onze branche tegenspreken. Goudzoekers en mensenschuivers redden dat niet.

CoStaff werkt met veel tijdelijke collega’s, uit België of Oost-Europa. Onze harde kern bestaat uit mensen met praktijkervaring. Onze collega's van kantoor hebben zelf met werkschoenen in de klei gestaan. Werkschoenen dus. Verwacht bij CoStaff geen strakke maatschoenen en stropdassen. Wij weten wat er speelt en waar het bij uw bedrijf om draait. En minstens zo belangrijk, we kennen onze rol - u roept en wij draaien!

Name: Ezine Excellence
Description:
Caroline Donnelly helps entrepreneurial women stand out and deliver a strong voice that connects and creates relationships with their prospects and clients. With an intense love for learning – and all things techie – Caroline never doubts her ability to figure things out quickly and has yet to encounter a computer program she couldn’t learn.

Growing up as a middle child, Caroline often felt lost in the shuffle with no voice, no confidence, and low self-esteem. During her first career, which lasted twenty years in administration with non-profit organizations, Caroline helped others improve their lives and human rights – helping them have a voice… and she found her voice and place in the world.

Eventually, Caroline was ready for change and in the late ‘90’s, made a dramatic career shift to become a freight train conductor at a time when less than 2% of Canadians employed in that position were women. Caroline is proud to have paved the way for other women to succeed in a place many considered to be reserved for men.

When the physical demands of working on the railroad impacted her health, Caroline decided to start her own business.

Today, Caroline is an accomplished virtual assistant. She helps women entrepreneurs eliminate overwhelm so they can focus on making more money.

Description:
Manter e administrar uma frota de veículos na empresa é uma atividade que não gera resultados diretos, mas é essencial para fatores como deslocamento de funcionários, logística de distribuição, atendimento ao cliente dentre muitos outros.

Desta forma, ao terceirizar a frota, a empresa não precisa mais se preocupar com o fato de manter uma grande quantidade de veículos e uma equipe específica para a sua gestão, podendo se dedicar com mais atenção à sua atividade-fim.

Além do mais, terceirizando sua frota, a sua empresa passa a ter controle maior sobre os custos incorridos nesta operação, já que o valor é definido em contrato.

A responsabilidade de manutenção da frota passa a ser nossa, garantindo a sua empresa toda a assistência necessária como documentação e impostos em dia, revisões e manutenções periódicas, disponibilidade de veículos caso necessário.

Oferecemos veículos corporativos desde modelos leves, médios e de grande porte. A gestão da frota é feita de forma próxima e acompanhada para que sua empresa não tenha nenhuma surpresa.

Name: Mastro Virtual Assistant
Description:
Have you ever been so tied up with admin, that you spend more time working on paperwork than doing the job you love? Why not get Mastro to be your virtual assistant and take care of the tasks you don’t like or are too busy to do!

Mastro offers general business support - from data entry, template creation, graphs and charts to minute taking.

We are also skilled in creating standard operating procedures, employee handbooks, training manuals and process documentation.  We can review your current processes and look for opportunities to make improvements that save time and increase productivity.

If you’re a Tradie and looking to offload some of your admin, we can offer assistance with your scheduling, ordering supplies, creating/following up on quotes and invoicing/receipting.

What is a Virtual Assistant? 

A Virtual Assistant (VA) is a business owner who performs administrative and other support tasks for your business from a remote location. VAs are very flexible and work a variety of hours.  Some are part-time, full-time or casual.

For small business owners, who may not have any other form of support and aren’t yet at a size where they can commit to hiring someone in-house, virtual assistants make this type of support accessible, so owners can focus on money-making tasks in their business, enabling them to grow.

Here are five reasons you should hire a VA.

* Your to-do list is incomplete
* You’re doing work you don’t like or don’t have experience in
* You feel unorganised and scattered
* You feel frustrated or burnt out because you are working a lot, but your business isn’t growing
* Your free time is nonexistent because you spend so much time on administrative tasks

You can use a VA as often, or as little, as you require.  We have ad-hoc casual rates or packages of hours that will best support your business needs.

Name: Octrooi Administratie Bureau van Buren
Description:
Wij verzorgen alle octrooiadministratieve - en formele handelingen. Hiermee kunnen wij veel betekenen voor:
- De individuele uitvinder die meent een goede uitvinding gedaan. 
- De bestaande octrooibureaus die al dan niet een eigen octrooiafdeling hebben.
Werkzaamheden: 
- Officieel indienen van octrooiaanvragen: 
Als u een octrooiaanvrage heeft, kan ons bureau voor de indiening(en) zorgen in de landen waar u uw idee geoctrooieerd wilt hebben. Dit kan zijn een ‘eerste indiening’ een buitenlandse indiening, een internationale (PCT) indiening, de nationale indieningen vanuit die PCT aanvrage, valideren in Europese landen van een Europees octrooi, het indienen van afsplitsingen enz. Het verschil tussen deze aanvragen wordt verder op deze internet pagina uitgelegd. 
- Verzorgen van alle formaliteiten:
Om aan alle formele eisen van de nationale wetgevingen te voldoen, kan het nodig zijn dat uitvinders en/of aanvragers documenten dienen in te vullen en te tekenen die wellicht door een notaris en een consulaat gelegaliseerd dienen te worden. Ook andere documenten zijn nodig.  De vereisten per land zijn zeer verschillend. Wij kunnen voor u al deze formaliteiten verzorgen en ervoor zorgen dat deze op formeel correcte wijze worden ingediend bij de desbetreffende octrooiraad.
- Termijnadministratie
Als een octrooiaanvrage in een land ingediend is, krijgt u te maken met allerlei termijnen die door ons bureau geadministreerd worden. Als wij opdracht krijgen om alle termijnen in ons administratieve octrooisysteem bij te houden, dan houden wij u nauwkeurig en ruimschoots voor het verstrijken van de termijn op de hoogte. U krijgt hiervan per octrooiaanvrage en per land een overzicht toegestuurd. 
 - Instandhoudingstaxen
Een apart hoofdstuk binnen de termijnadministratie zijn de zgn. instandhoudingstaxen. Voor een beschrijving daarvan verwijzen wij u naar de tab ‘instandhoudingstaxen’op onze internetsite.

Główne trudności, na które napotykają przedsiębiorcy to zmienność stawek i regulacji prawnych w obszarze dystrybucji, duża opieszałość zakładów energetycznych oraz brak wiedzy w zakresie optymalizacji kosztów przesyłu energii.

Nasze doświadczenia wskazują, że wielu przedsiębiorców chcąc zoptymalizować koszty działalności, skupia się jedynie na cenie zakupu energii czynnej. Przedsiębiorcy nie mają często świadomości, jak duże oszczędności można wygenerować w obszarze dystrybucji. Co więcej, nie podejmują nawet próby, z obawy przed trudnościami wynikającymi z konieczności współpracy ze zbiurokratyzowanym zakładem energetycznym.

Name: METALSANDCNC
Description:
A unique online service providing platform for CNC machining / Precision manufacturing industries.

Outsourcing: If you have any part to be outsourced, you can just post your drawing online. Our suppliers who give us Non-Disclosure Agreement & who are well audited will give their best price. We will ensure the quality of the product by inspecting in our premises before we dispatch it to you. Your unique project ID will help you track the status of the Order at every stage.

Looking for Machining Orders: If you are a smaller company or if you are having high machining capacity, you can register with us for taking up more orders. Our quality team will audit you and will provide a Username & Password. You can then bid for the part online and get the parts for machining if you meet the target price.

Selling Dead Inventory: You can sell off your unused inventory in Metals, Machines by simply posting them online in our website. Our wide range of customers who are in need of specific material or machine will buy off the stock from you. This will help you reduce dead inventory.

Looking for right employees: We have a Job portal specific for this industry. You can post your requirement online or search from our wide database of profiles.

BLS has evolved as a subsidiary of Banthia & Co. Advocates (BCA) – one of the leading law firms in India, running from the past 63 yrs. employing around 300+ lawyers.   

Why outsource?
The 2008 financial crash and global recession changed the legal landscape across the globe and made law firms and corporates more sensitive to the need for improved efficiency, value and most importantly, reduced cost. One of the ways to achieve this came as to outsource the legal and paralegal work to other parts of the globe where it can be done relatively cheaper but still maintaining the quality, consistency and confidentiality. India appears to be the most sought after destination for legal outsourcing work due to a large number of lawyers graduating every year with impressive communication skills and are well versed with laws of commonwealth countries. 

Why us?
At BLS, we believe that there is no one-size-fits-all solution for saving costs hence we have formulated a collaborative model that bring tangible benefits, unique to each client. Name: EuroSourceLine UK Limted
Description:
EuroSourceLine (UK) Limited began the buying of non-production items (NPI) - often referred to as maintenance, repair and operations (MRO) - in Germany back in 1994 and has regularly achieved cost reductions of 30% for its clients without affecting the quality of their products, processes or customer service.

By entering into a partnership with EuroSourceLine (UK) Limited, organisations  have benefited from guaranteed cost savings, improved process controls, increased service levels together with numerous soft cost advantages.

Outsourcing non-production items is certainly not a new idea, it is certainly long implanted in the US. However, the problem is often lack of transparency. MRO outsourcing companies take over the buying departments and change all the suppliers. These companies operate ‘closed book’ systems, never disclosing the prices they pay suppliers.

Profits come from charging a margin on everything purchased, and this margin tends to creep up the longer the company stays in place.

Perhaps more alarmingly is that these companies have a tendency to own the suppliers from which they buy. By cutting a swathe through their clients’ suppliers, relationships are lost with organisations that often have deep and valuable knowledge.

On the other hand, ‘open book’ suppliers, such as  EuroSourceLine (UK) Limited, disclose exactly how much the client is paying the supplier for every purchased item.

Name: O.Y.C.
Nordic Dialogue
Description:
Nordic Dialogue CC AB är ett svenskägt kontaktcenterföretag som är specialiserat på den nordiska marknaden.

Vår affärsidé är att erbjuda företag och organisationer outsourcade affärskritiska tjänster såsom kundtjänst, svarsservice, översättningar samt hantering av sociala medier.

Vi menar att det råder en brist på prisvärda alternativ som är långsiktigt hållbara på den nordiska marknaden.Löneläget i kombination med branschens karaktär gör det hela till ett svårlagt pussel där långsiktighet och prispress inte alltid går hand i hand.

Vi har lyckats lösa detta genom att ha flerspråkiga medarbetare som är permanent bosatta i utlandet.

Våra medarbetare är högskoleutbildade lingvister som talar minst 4 språk flytande. De är unga, välutbildade och ambitiösa vilket gör dem till vår organisations största tillgång.

Genom att erbjuda våra tjänster från utlandet så skapar vi långsiktiga möjligheter för alla sorters organisationer att ta tillvara på de affärstillfällen som uppstår när språk och kulturer blir en global tillgång, och på detta vis tävla med de större företagen som redan drar nytta av detta.

Vi har vårt säte i Stockholm, samt ett lokalt kontor i Belgrad, Serbien.
